STRIKE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Strike
STRIKE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After you play a [gold]Strike[/gold], transform it into a [gold]Flash of Steel[/gold] for the rest of combat.
STRIKE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Even the plainest blow can be honed to a gleam.
DEFEND_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Defend
DEFEND_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After you play a [gold]Defend[/gold], transform it into a [gold]Finesse[/gold] for the rest of combat.
DEFEND_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Within a guard hides the cleverest scheme.
MOLTEN_FIST_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Molten Fist
MOLTEN_FIST_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After you play [gold]Molten Fist[/gold], add 1 [gold]Dominate[/gold] to your hand.
MOLTEN_FIST_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The fist still burns; its embers become a command.
FEED_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Feed
FEED_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: When you slay an enemy with [gold]Feed[/gold], gain an additional [blue]15%[/blue] of your Max HP as Max HP.
WELL_LAID_PLANS_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Well-Laid Plans
WELL_LAID_PLANS_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Well-Laid Plans[/gold] lets you retain any number of cards.
WELL_LAID_PLANS_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The game isn't over; a good hand is never let go.
NEUROSURGE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Neurosurge
NEUROSURGE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Neurosurge[/gold] applies its [gold]Doom[/gold] to all enemies instead.
NEUROSURGE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: An overloaded mind must spill somewhere.
SUBROUTINE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Subroutine
SUBROUTINE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, put all [gold]Subroutines[/gold] from anywhere into your hand.
SUBROUTINE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Every process answers to my call.
NIGHTMARE_RUNE.title: Nightmare
NIGHTMARE_RUNE.description: When a [gold]Dark[/gold] orb triggers its passive, deal damage equal to that orb's value to the lowest-HP enemy.
NIGHTMARE_RUNE.flavor: The dark remembers every debt you owe.
JUDICATOR_RUNE.title: Judicator
JUDICATOR_RUNE.description: Deal [blue]25%[/blue] more damage to enemies below 50% HP. Whenever an enemy dies, restore your Energy to full.
JUDICATOR_RUNE.flavor: A judgment need not be long, only delivered when the enemy is low enough.
SLAP_RUNE.title: Slap
SLAP_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
SLAP_RUNE.flavor: First comes the slap; then the humiliation takes root.
TANK_ENGINE_RUNE.title: Tank Engine
TANK_ENGINE_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack grants [blue]6%[/blue] Max HP and increases your size by [blue]6%[/blue].
TANK_ENGINE_RUNE.flavor: The deeper the rumble, the farther it is from stopping.
EUREKA_RUNE.title: Eureka
EUREKA_RUNE.description: For every [blue]6[/blue] relics you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
EUREKA_RUNE.flavor: Inspiration does not fall from the sky. It crawls out of a pile of parts.
INFINITE_LOOP_RUNE.title: Infinite Loop
INFINITE_LOOP_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn. After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Every [blue]4[/blue] stacks grants another [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
INFINITE_LOOP_RUNE.flavor: Repeat long enough and even miracles begin to look procedural.
ASTRAL_BODY_RUNE.title: Astral Body
ASTRAL_BODY_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]50%[/blue] Max HP. Deal [blue]10%[/blue] less damage.
ASTRAL_BODY_RUNE.flavor: The stars may lend you a body, but they leave their weight behind.
ANCIENT_WINE_RUNE.title: Ancient Wine
ANCIENT_WINE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play a Skill, heal [blue]1[/blue].
ANCIENT_WINE_RUNE.flavor: Old wine does not heal wounds. It only keeps the blood warm.
SLOW_COOK_RUNE.title: Slow Cook
SLOW_COOK_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies equal to [blue]5%[/blue] of your Max HP, rounded down.
SLOW_COOK_RUNE.flavor: The fire need not hurry. What is in the pot has no choice left.
FROST_WRAITH_RUNE.title: Frost Wraith
FROST_WRAITH_RUNE.description: At the start of combat and every [blue]3[/blue] turns afterward, all enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] turn of [gold]Slow[/gold].
FROST_WRAITH_RUNE.flavor: The cold does not kill. It drags every step into a last word.
NO_NONSENSE_RUNE.title: No Nonsense
NO_NONSENSE_RUNE.description: You cannot draw cards except for your normal start-of-turn draw. Each prevented draw instead grants that much Strength.
NO_NONSENSE_RUNE.flavor: Leave abstract thinking to someone else; here, fists handle the work.
DEXTERITY_TO_STRENGTH_RUNE.title: Dexterity To Strength
DEXTERITY_TO_STRENGTH_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Changes to your Dexterity are converted into equal Strength.
DEXTERITY_TO_STRENGTH_RUNE.flavor: The lighter the footwork, the heavier the punch lands.
STRENGTH_TO_DEXTERITY_RUNE.title: Strength To Dexterity
STRENGTH_TO_DEXTERITY_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity. Changes to your Strength are converted into equal Dexterity.
STRENGTH_TO_DEXTERITY_RUNE.flavor: Twist brute force fine enough and it becomes footwork.
DEXTERITY_STRENGTH_TO_FOCUS_RUNE.title: Dexterity Strength To Focus
DEXTERITY_STRENGTH_TO_FOCUS_RUNE.descrip: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Focus. Changes to your Strength and Dexterity are converted into equal Focus.
DEXTERITY_STRENGTH_TO_FOCUS_RUNE.flavor: Only when muscle and motion go quiet does the core begin to speak.
SUPER_BRAIN_RUNE.title: Super Brain
SUPER_BRAIN_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, gain Plated Armor equal to [blue]1/3[/blue] of your main deck size, rounded down.
SUPER_BRAIN_RUNE.flavor: Think hard enough and even the skull turns into a shield.
MIND_TO_MATTER_RUNE.title: Mind To Matter
MIND_TO_MATTER_RUNE.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP for each card in your main deck.
MIND_TO_MATTER_RUNE.flavor: Pile up enough thoughts and the body has to make room.
STATS_RUNE.title: Stats!
STATS_RUNE.flavor: Hammer the numbers into the bone first.
GIANT_SLAYER_RUNE.title: Giant Slayer
GIANT_SLAYER_RUNE.description: Your body becomes smaller. Draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards each turn. When you deal damage to an enemy, gain [blue]1%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]6[/blue] Max HP it has above you, up to [blue]50%[/blue].
GIANT_SLAYER_RUNE.flavor: Giants are too tall, so the weak point is always below the knee.
NIMBLE_RUNE.title: Nimble
NIMBLE_RUNE.flavor: One more card is often one more way out.
OVERFLOW_RUNE.title: Overflow
OVERFLOW_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn. Cards in your hand cost [blue]+1[/blue]. The healing you receive, the Block you gain, and the damage you deal are doubled.
OVERFLOW_RUNE.flavor: A gate should not be half open. Either drought or flood.
STURDY_RUNE.title: Sturdy
STURDY_RUNE.description: At the start of each turn, heal [blue]2%[/blue] of your Max HP. If you are below [blue]50%[/blue] HP, heal [blue]4%[/blue] of your Max HP instead.
STURDY_RUNE.flavor: A crack is not an ending, only proof it is still holding.
LOOP_RUNE.title: Loop
LOOP_RUNE.flavor: Tuning today to match yesterday saves a great many prayers.
VITALITY_SURGE_RUNE.title: Vitality Surge
VITALITY_SURGE_RUNE.description: For every [blue]50[/blue] Max HP you have, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn. For every [blue]100[/blue] Max HP you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] additional Energy each turn.
VITALITY_SURGE_RUNE.flavor: Where flesh abounds, even footsteps carry the wind.
OK_BOOMERANG_RUNE.title: OK Boomerang
OK_BOOMERANG_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]OK Boomerang[/gold] to your deck.
OK_BOOMERANG_RUNE.flavor: It leaves like a joke and returns like a debt collector.
DIVINE_INTERVENTION_RUNE.title: Divine Intervention
DIVINE_INTERVENTION_RUNE.flavor: Miracles rarely explain themselves; they only move the fatal inch aside.
OUR_HEALING_RUNE.title: Our Healing
OUR_HEALING_RUNE.description: Whenever a teammate gains healing, you also gain that much healing.
OUR_HEALING_RUNE.flavor: What mends one of us mends us all.
SONATA_RUNE.title: Sonata
SONATA_RUNE.description: At the start of odd-numbered turns, all players draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards. At the start of even-numbered turns, heal all players for [blue]1[/blue] and give all players [blue]2[/blue] Block.
SONATA_RUNE.flavor: One beat drives forward, one beat stops the bleeding. The piece is just long enough.
RED_ENVELOPE_RUNE.title: Red Envelope
RED_ENVELOPE_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain an extra reward: [blue]75%[/blue] chance for [blue]20~50[/blue] Gold, [blue]25%[/blue] chance for a random stat forger.
RED_ENVELOPE_RUNE.flavor: Red paper wraps luck and the sound of the ledger alike.
ESCAPE_PLAN_RUNE.title: Escape Plan
ESCAPE_PLAN_RUNE.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of your next turn gain Block equal to [blue]60%[/blue] of your Max HP and gain [gold]Shrink[/gold] for [blue]1[/blue] turn. Once per combat.
ESCAPE_PLAN_RUNE.flavor: The most reliable retreat is usually written before the fight starts.
MIND_PURIFICATION_RUNE.title: Mind Purification
MIND_PURIFICATION_RUNE.description: After you kill an enemy, deal damage equal to [blue]30%[/blue] of each other enemy's current HP to them.
MIND_PURIFICATION_RUNE.flavor: So-called purification just leaves the problem to someone nearby.
BAD_TASTE_RUNE.title: Bad Taste
BAD_TASTE_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, heal [blue]1[/blue]. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
BAD_TASTE_RUNE.flavor: Pain that can be recycled is not waste.
COURAGE_OF_COLOSSUS_RUNE.title: Courage Of Colossus
COURAGE_OF_COLOSSUS_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]3[/blue] Plated Armor. Triggers up to [blue]2[/blue] times each turn.
COURAGE_OF_COLOSSUS_RUNE.flavor: When courage is heavy enough, you can wear it outright.
ENDLESS_RECOVERY_RUNE.title: Endless Recovery
ENDLESS_RECOVERY_RUNE.description: Whenever you enter a room, heal [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP.
ENDLESS_RECOVERY_RUNE.flavor: The journey is not kind. It only makes sure you do not fall.
GLASS_CANNON_RUNE.title: Glass Cannon
GLASS_CANNON_RUNE.description: Deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage. You cannot heal above [blue]70%[/blue] HP.
GLASS_CANNON_RUNE.flavor: It breaks loudly, and loudly enough to be worth it.
MAD_SCIENTIST_RUNE.title: Mad Scientist
MAD_SCIENTIST_RUNE.description: Your Orb slots have no cap. Whenever you channel [blue]1[/blue] Orb, gain [blue]1[/blue] additional Orb slot.
MAD_SCIENTIST_RUNE.flavor: Connect the wires first. The ethics committee can arrive later.
SPEEDSTER_RUNE.title: Speedster
SPEEDSTER_RUNE.description: For every [blue]2[/blue] Max Energy you have, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn, rounded down.
SPEEDSTER_RUNE.flavor: When energy floods the wrist, hesitation cannot keep up.
SPEED_DEMON_RUNE.title: Speed Demon
SPEED_DEMON_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you deal damage to an enemy, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
SPEED_DEMON_RUNE.flavor: The first one to move finds even opportunity chasing after them.
SERVANT_MASTER_RUNE.title: Servant Master
SERVANT_MASTER_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Necro Mastery[/gold]. At the start of each turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] Summon.
SERVANT_MASTER_RUNE.flavor: Doing it yourself is proof that management failed.
JEWELED_GAUNTLET_RUNE.title: Jeweled Gauntlet
JEWELED_GAUNTLET_RUNE.description: Cards you play have a [blue]33%[/blue] chance to be played an additional time.
JEWELED_GAUNTLET_RUNE.flavor: When the light comes on, luck gets called technique.
SOUL_EATER_RUNE.title: Soul Eater
SOUL_EATER_RUNE.description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain Max HP equal to [blue]5%[/blue] of its Max HP.
SOUL_EATER_RUNE.flavor: Every bite of darkness makes the shadow look more like you.
INFERNAL_CONDUIT_RUNE.title: Infernal Conduit
INFERNAL_CONDUIT_RUNE.description: Your Attack cards apply [blue]2[/blue] stacks of infinitely stackable [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies. For every [blue]5[/blue] Burn on enemies, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy at the start of your next turn.
INFERNAL_CONDUIT_RUNE.flavor: The best conductor can carry even the heat of hell.
DUAL_WIELD_RUNE.title: Dual Wield
DUAL_WIELD_RUNE.description: Attack cards you play are played an additional time, but you deal [blue]40%[/blue] less damage.
DUAL_WIELD_RUNE.flavor: If either blade is idle, it is a waste.
GOLIATH_RUNE.title: Goliath
GOLIATH_RUNE.description: Grow in size, gain [blue]35%[/blue] Max HP, and gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage, Block, and healing.
GOLIATH_RUNE.flavor: Reach a certain height and even your shadow can crush the enemy first.
DONATION_RUNE.title: Donation
DONATION_RUNE.flavor: Do not ask what it is for. The receipt will appear on its own.
HEAVY_HITTER_RUNE.title: Heavy Hitter
HEAVY_HITTER_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]1%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]6[/blue] Max HP you have, up to [blue]30%[/blue].
HEAVY_HITTER_RUNE.flavor: Weight is only a number. Impact is the answer.
TWICE_THRICE_RUNE.title: Twice Thrice
TWICE_THRICE_RUNE.description: Every third Attack card you play is played an additional time.
TWICE_THRICE_RUNE.flavor: The first hit probes, the second confirms, the third decides.
FIREBRAND_RUNE.title: Firebrand
FIREBRAND_RUNE.description: Your Attack cards apply [blue]2[/blue] stacks of infinitely stackable [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies.
FIREBRAND_RUNE.flavor: When the fire is too small, morality only gets in the way.
BURNING_INTEREST_RUNE.title: Burning Interest
BURNING_INTEREST_RUNE.description: Your Attack cards apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of infinitely stackable [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies. For every [blue]1[/blue] damage dealt by [gold]Burn[/gold], gain [blue]2[/blue] count. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
BURNING_INTEREST_RUNE.flavor: Every flame in the ledger accrues.
NIGHTSTALKING_RUNE.title: Nightstalking
NIGHTSTALKING_RUNE.description: Every time you draw [blue]15[/blue] cards, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold].
NIGHTSTALKING_RUNE.flavor: The night does not help the good. It helps the ones who have not struck yet.
MASTER_OF_DUALITY_RUNE.title: Master of Duality
MASTER_OF_DUALITY_RUNE.description: Playing a Skill grants [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength. Playing an Attack grants [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Dexterity.
MASTER_OF_DUALITY_RUNE.flavor: Blade and spell need not reconcile. They only need to take turns working.
BIG_STRENGTH_RUNE.title: Blunt Force
BIG_STRENGTH_RUNE.flavor: Some problems really can be solved by force.
HAND_OF_BARON_RUNE.title: Hand of Baron
HAND_OF_BARON_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage. At the start of each turn, all enemies gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
HAND_OF_BARON_RUNE.flavor: When the gift descends, knees are more honest than mouths.
CANT_TOUCH_THIS_RUNE.title: Can't Touch This
CANT_TOUCH_THIS_RUNE.description: After playing a card that costs [blue]2[/blue] or more, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold].
CANT_TOUCH_THIS_RUNE.flavor: You may reach out. The result is another matter.
TORMENTOR_RUNE.title: Tormentor
TORMENTOR_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, apply [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]1[/blue] time each turn.
ADAMANT_RUNE.title: Adamant
ADAMANT_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block. Triggers up to [blue]5[/blue] times each turn.
ADAMANT_RUNE.flavor: When malice hits stone, it only makes itself ring.
GET_EXCITED_RUNE.title: Get Excited
GET_EXCITED_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] extra Energy and draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards. Whenever an enemy dies, next turn gain [blue]2[/blue] extra Energy and draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.
GET_EXCITED_RUNE.flavor: Joy carries more weight when it pays out a beat late.
QUEEN_RUNE.title: Queen
QUEEN_RUNE.description: At the start of each turn, the enemy with the highest HP gains [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Frail[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
QUEEN_RUNE.flavor: Once the order is given, hesitation becomes treason.
MOUNTAIN_SOUL_RUNE.title: Mountain Soul
MOUNTAIN_SOUL_RUNE.description: If you took no unblocked damage last turn, gain Block equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP at the start of this turn.
MOUNTAIN_SOUL_RUNE.flavor: The mountain never dodges. It only waits for you to break first.
SWIFT_AND_SAFE_RUNE.title: Swift and Safe
SWIFT_AND_SAFE_RUNE.description: Every time you draw [blue]10[/blue] cards, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
SWIFT_AND_SAFE_RUNE.flavor: The faster you move, the more you need a shell around mistakes.
SACRIFICE_RUNE.title: Sacrifice
SACRIFICE_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]10%[/blue] more healing and Block. At the start of each turn, gain [blue]5[/blue] count for each enemy. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
SACRIFICE_RUNE.flavor: Every surviving enemy is a stake not yet cashed in.
GOLDREND_RUNE.title: Goldrend
GOLDREND_RUNE.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, gain [blue]10[/blue] count. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
GOLDREND_RUNE.flavor: Every strike should make a sound, preferably coins.
CERBERUS_RUNE.title: Cerberus
CERBERUS_RUNE.description: Each turn, your first three Attack cards can be played for free.
CERBERUS_RUNE.flavor: When three mouths roar at once, the cost hides first.
CIRCLE_OF_DEATH_RUNE.title: Circle Of Death
CIRCLE_OF_DEATH_RUNE.description: Whenever you gain Block or healing during combat, deal that much damage to a random enemy.
CIRCLE_OF_DEATH_RUNE.flavor: Turn the wound into a circle and the next cut knows the way back.
FAN_THE_HAMMER_RUNE.title: Fan The Hammer
FAN_THE_HAMMER_RUNE.description: The first Attack card you play each turn is replayed [blue]3[/blue] times, but its damage becomes [blue]35%[/blue] of normal.
FAN_THE_HAMMER_RUNE.flavor: The trigger is pulled once; the echo need not obey.
FEY_MAGIC_RUNE.title: Fey Magic
FEY_MAGIC_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you use a card that costs [blue]2[/blue] or more to deal damage to an enemy, stun that enemy.
FEY_MAGIC_RUNE.flavor: The truly difficult spell steals the next step first.
WATCH_OUT_GRAPEFRUIT_RUNE.title: Watch Out, Cupcake
WATCH_OUT_GRAPEFRUIT_RUNE.description: After winning combat, drop an extra food relic. Food relics can drop repeatedly; if you already have [gold]Ice Cream[/gold], [gold]Ice Cream[/gold] will not drop again.
WATCH_OUT_GRAPEFRUIT_RUNE.flavor: Sweetness is only bait. The point is what is hidden under the plate.
PROTEIN_SHAKE_RUNE.title: Protein Shake
PROTEIN_SHAKE_RUNE.description: For each [blue]2[/blue] Max HP you have, gain [blue]1%[/blue] more healing and Block.
PROTEIN_SHAKE_RUNE.flavor: Powder goes down. A wall stands up.
PROTECTIVE_VEIL_RUNE.title: Protective Veil
PROTECTIVE_VEIL_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
PROTECTIVE_VEIL_RUNE.flavor: The real veil makes the curse believe it has already landed.
REPULSOR_RUNE.title: Repulsor
REPULSOR_RUNE.description: The first time each combat you take unblocked damage, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
REPULSOR_RUNE.flavor: A corner has no escape, only a force field that has not fired yet.
THORNMAIL_RUNE.title: Thornmail
THORNMAIL_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold]. For every [blue]40[/blue] Max HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]Thorns[/gold], up to [blue]3[/blue] extra.
THORNMAIL_RUNE.flavor: Before contact, it looks like only a suit of armor.
DAWNBRINGERS_RESOLVE_RUNE.title: Dawnbringer's Resolve
DAWNBRINGERS_RESOLVE_RUNE.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, gain [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to [blue]15%[/blue] of your Max HP. Once per combat.
DAWNBRINGERS_RESOLVE_RUNE.flavor: Dawn will not arrive early, but someone can hold you together until then.
SHRINK_RAY_RUNE.title: Shrink Ray
SHRINK_RAY_RUNE.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
SHRINK_RAY_RUNE.flavor: Once size can be negotiated, dignity shrinks too.
ZEALOT_RUNE.title: Zealot
ZEALOT_RUNE.description: For every [blue]5[/blue] relics you have, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card at the start of combat.
ZEALOT_RUNE.flavor: The more relics you carry, the louder the opening pulse becomes.
BACK_TO_BASICS_RUNE.title: Back To Basics
BACK_TO_BASICS_RUNE.description: You cannot play cards that cost [blue]3[/blue] or more. The healing you receive, the Block you gain, and the damage you deal increase by [blue]40%[/blue].
BACK_TO_BASICS_RUNE.flavor: Tricks may forget you. Fundamentals do not.
DRAW_YOUR_SWORD_RUNE.title: Draw Your Sword
DRAW_YOUR_SWORD_RUNE.description: You can no longer channel Orbs. Whenever you would channel an Orb, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold] instead. Changes to your [gold]Focus[/gold] are converted into equal [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
DRAW_YOUR_SWORD_RUNE.flavor: The moment the blade leaves the sheath, the way back should be cut as well.
FEEL_THE_BURN_RUNE.title: Feel The Burn
FEEL_THE_BURN_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Feel the Burn[/gold] to your deck.
FEEL_THE_BURN_RUNE.flavor: After the bottle hits the ground, the afterheat starts collecting debts.
MIKAELS_BLESSING_RUNE.title: Mikael's Blessing
MIKAELS_BLESSING_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Mikael's Blessing[/gold] to your deck.
MIKAELS_BLESSING_RUNE.flavor: A true blessing washes bitterness out by the root.
FIRST_AID_KIT_RUNE.title: First Aid Kit
FIRST_AID_KIT_RUNE.description: The healing you receive and the Block you gain increase by [blue]25%[/blue].
FIRST_AID_KIT_RUNE.flavor: Bandages do not understand miracles. They only understand speed.
REGENERATION_SUPPRESSION_RUNE.title: Regeneration Suppression
REGENERATION_SUPPRESSION_RUNE.descriptio: Whenever a monster would heal outside of a revive, it instead gains that much Block at the start of the next player turn.
REGENERATION_SUPPRESSION_RUNE.flavor: The wound learns silence, and only the shell answers.
GIANT_SERPENTS_FANG_RUNE.title: Giant Serpent's Fang
GIANT_SERPENTS_FANG_RUNE.description: When you deal damage to an enemy, additionally reduce its Block by [blue]50%[/blue].
GIANT_SERPENTS_FANG_RUNE.flavor: Shields can be poisoned too; the symptom is fracture.
HOLY_FIRE_RUNE.title: Holy Fire
HOLY_FIRE_RUNE.description: Whenever you heal during combat, apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to a random enemy equal to the amount healed.
HOLY_FIRE_RUNE.flavor: Sacred fire loves to set bystanders alight.
HOMEGUARD_RUNE.title: Homeguard
HOMEGUARD_RUNE.description: If you took no unblocked damage last turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards at the start of this turn.
HOMEGUARD_RUNE.flavor: Hold the ground beneath you and the road ahead opens itself.
LIGHT_EM_UP_RUNE.title: Light Em Up
LIGHT_EM_UP_RUNE.description: Every fourth Attack card you play is played an additional time.
LIGHT_EM_UP_RUNE.flavor: On the fourth swing, the spark speaks for you one more time.
SHRINK_ENGINE_RUNE.title: Shrink Engine
SHRINK_ENGINE_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack reduces your size by [blue]2%[/blue]. For every [blue]4[/blue] stacks, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn. For every [blue]8[/blue] stacks, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
SHRINK_ENGINE_RUNE.flavor: The smaller you get, the faster you move; the faster you move, the harder you are to plan for.
STATS_ON_STATS_RUNE.title: Stats on Stats!
STATS_ON_STATS_RUNE.flavor: One layer of hammer marks over another.
TRANSMUTE_CHAOS_RUNE.title: Transmute: Chaos
TRANSMUTE_CHAOS_RUNE.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]2[/blue] random Hextech runes.
TRANSMUTE_CHAOS_RUNE.flavor: Only when chaos is entered into the ledger does order truly begin.
TRANSMUTE_PRISMATIC_RUNE.title: Transmute: Prismatic
TRANSMUTE_PRISMATIC_RUNE.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]1[/blue] random Prismatic Hextech rune.
TRANSMUTE_PRISMATIC_RUNE.flavor: Gold is only the threshold. Prismatic is the wager.
TRANSMUTE_GOLD_RUNE.title: Transmute: Gold
TRANSMUTE_GOLD_RUNE.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]1[/blue] random Gold Hextech rune.
TRANSMUTE_GOLD_RUNE.flavor: When the silver shell cracks, what is inside may no longer be old.
STATS_ON_STATS_ON_STATS_RUNE.title: Stats on Stats on Stats!
STATS_ON_STATS_ON_STATS_RUNE.flavor: When the final hammer falls, the numbers no longer look like numbers.
STRENGTH_FORGE.title: Strength Forger
STRENGTH_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength.
STRENGTH_FORGE.flavor: A nail that fixes weight into every punch.
DEXTERITY_FORGE.title: Dexterity Forger
DEXTERITY_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity.
DEXTERITY_FORGE.flavor: Hammer hesitation thin enough and motion comes naturally.
SILVER_PLATING_FORGE.title: Plating Forger
SILVER_PLATING_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]4[/blue] Plating.
SILVER_PLATING_FORGE.flavor: Thin armor steps forward before fear can speak.
UPGRADE_FORGE.title: Upgrade Forger
UPGRADE_FORGE.flavor: One hammer strike is enough to teach an old move a new use.
FOCUS_FORGE.title: Focus Forger
FOCUS_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] Focus.
FOCUS_FORGE.flavor: After noise is melted away, the core has only one direction.
LIFE_FORGE.title: Life Forger
POCKET_FORGE.title: Pocket Forger
POCKET_FORGE.flavor: One more pocket is one more answer kept out of sight.
PREPARED_FORGE.title: Prepared Forger
PREPARED_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards.
PREPARED_FORGE.flavor: True preparation is holding one more answer before the fight begins.
NECROBINDER_FORGE.title: Necrobinder Forger
NECROBINDER_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, Summon [blue]6[/blue].
NECROBINDER_FORGE.flavor: What echoes from the furnace is not hammering, but footsteps.
SILVER_STARS_FORGE.title: Stars Forger
SILVER_STARS_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] extra Stars.
SILVER_STARS_FORGE.flavor: Hold the first light steady, and sovereignty will not arrive late.
SILVER_ORB_FORGE.title: Orb Forger
SILVER_ORB_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, Channel [blue]2[/blue] random Orbs.
SILVER_ORB_FORGE.flavor: The furnace core turns once and spits out an answer with a mind of its own.
FORGING_FORGE.title: Forging Forger
FORGING_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, Forge [blue]8[/blue].
FORGING_FORGE.flavor: Before the royal blade is raised, the sparks have already sharpened it.
CONSTITUTION_FORGE.title: Constitution Forger
CONSTITUTION_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity.
CONSTITUTION_FORGE.flavor: Muscle and motion are formed in the same fire.
DISASTER_FORGE.title: Disaster Forger
DISASTER_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] Weak and [blue]1[/blue] Vulnerable.
DISASTER_FORGE.flavor: The first hammer strike opens a fault line under every foe.
GOLD_LIFE_FORGE.title: Life Forger
GOLD_LIFE_FORGE.flavor: Scars widen into a deeper riverbed.
GOLD_FOCUS_FORGE.title: Focus Forger
GOLD_FOCUS_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Focus.
GOLD_FOCUS_FORGE.flavor: Two lines of noise are flattened by one hammer sound.
DRAW_FORGE.title: Draw Forger
DRAW_FORGE.description: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card.
DRAW_FORGE.flavor: Open one more drawer in fate.
RECOVERY_FORGE.title: Recovery Forger
RECOVERY_FORGE.description: At the start of your turn, heal [blue]1[/blue] HP.
RECOVERY_FORGE.flavor: The furnace is not hot, but it is warm enough for wounds to close.
GOLD_UPGRADE_FORGE.title: Upgrade Forger
GOLD_UPGRADE_FORGE.flavor: After three hammer strikes, the deck grows several new edges.
GLAM_FORGE.title: Glam Forger
GLAM_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Glam[/gold].
GLAM_FORGE.flavor: A layer of radiance makes even a plain card shine too bright.
SOULS_POWER_FORGE.title: Souls Power Forger
SOULS_POWER_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Souls Power[/gold].
SOULS_POWER_FORGE.flavor: The forge burns nothing—it only asks the soul to lean in.
STARS_FORGE.title: Stars Forger
STARS_FORGE.description: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Star.
STARS_FORGE.flavor: Forge sovereignty into light that can be held.
ORB_SLOT_FORGE.title: Orb Slot Forger
ORB_SLOT_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] additional Orb slots.
ORB_SLOT_FORGE.flavor: An opened slot will eventually find lightning.
PLATING_FORGE.title: Plating Forger
PLATING_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]6[/blue] Plating.
PLATING_FORGE.flavor: Caution hammered into armor that does not step back.
THORNS_FORGE.title: Thorns Forger
THORNS_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]4[/blue] Thorns.
THORNS_FORGE.flavor: Every barb remembers the hand that came for it.
ARTIFACT_FORGE.title: Artifact Forger
ARTIFACT_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Artifact.
ARTIFACT_FORGE.flavor: An unseen safeguard is hammered into the soul's shell.
VENOM_FORGE.title: Venom Forger
VENOM_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Envenom[/gold].
VENOM_FORGE.flavor: After the furnace cools, the edge is still dripping.
SHRINK_FORGE.title: Shrink Forger
SHRINK_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold] to all enemies.
SHRINK_FORGE.flavor: The hammer lands on empty air, and enemy shadows come up shorter.
SWIFT_FORGE.title: Swift Forger
SWIFT_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Swift[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].
SWIFT_FORGE.flavor: Forge the next move light enough to arrive early.
FIREWORKS_FORGE.title: Fireworks Forger
FIREWORKS_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to all enemies.
FIREWORKS_FORGE.flavor: The first sound of battle should be loud.
VIGOR_FORGE.title: Vigor Forger
VIGOR_FORGE.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
VIGOR_FORGE.flavor: The furnace makes the first strike burn hotter.
BLOCK_FORGE.title: Block Forger
BLOCK_FORGE.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block.
BLOCK_FORGE.flavor: Every turn begins by tightening the shield.
HOURGLASS_FORGE.title: Hourglass Forger
HOURGLASS_FORGE.description: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to all enemies.
HOURGLASS_FORGE.flavor: Every falling grain lands like a hammer.
MOMENTUM_FORGE.title: Momentum Forger
MOMENTUM_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Momentum[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
MOMENTUM_FORGE.flavor: Once a card starts accelerating, it rarely stops cleanly.
SUMMON_FORGE.title: Summon Forger
SUMMON_FORGE.description: At the start of your turn, Summon [blue]2[/blue].
SUMMON_FORGE.flavor: New bone-shadows keep rising from the ash.
FLESH_FORGE.title: Flesh Forger
FLESH_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Sleight of Flesh[/gold].
FLESH_FORGE.flavor: Flesh is not material. It is a spell still answering.
EMBERS_FORGE.title: Embers Forger
EMBERS_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Tezcatara's Ember[/gold].
EMBERS_FORGE.flavor: The ember is not out. It is waiting for the next card.
PRISMATIC_LIFE_FORGE.title: Life Forger
PRISMATIC_LIFE_FORGE.flavor: The fire no longer enlarges the vessel. It rewrites it.
ATTACK_FORGE.title: Attack Forger
ATTACK_FORGE.flavor: The edge is not longer. It simply knows where to land.
PROTECTION_FORGE.title: Protection Forger
PROTECTION_FORGE.flavor: The furnace leaves room for both wounds and shields.
ENERGY_FORGE.title: Energy Forger
ENERGY_FORGE.description: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy.
ENERGY_FORGE.flavor: If the furnace stays lit, the next step will not idle.
RITUAL_FORGE.title: Ritual Forger
RITUAL_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Ritual.
RITUAL_FORGE.flavor: When firelight forms a circle, power knows where to go.
REGEN_FORGE.title: Regen Forger
REGEN_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]4[/blue] Regen.
REGEN_FORGE.flavor: The body forgets the shape of pain.
BUFFER_FORGE.title: Buffer Forger
BUFFER_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Buffer.
BUFFER_FORGE.flavor: Fate hits it before it reaches you.
SLIPPERY_FORGE.title: Slippery Forger
SLIPPERY_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] Slippery.
PRISMATIC_ARTIFACT_FORGE.title: Artifact Forger
PRISMATIC_ARTIFACT_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] Artifact.
PRISMATIC_ARTIFACT_FORGE.flavor: Two safeguards keep the worst accident outside.
FORTUNE_FORGE.title: Fortune Forger
FORTUNE_FORGE.flavor: Every spark that falls from the furnace lands as coin.
SPIRAL_FORGE.title: Spiral Forger
SPIRAL_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Spiral[/gold].
SPIRAL_FORGE.flavor: Cast a card into the loop, and it returns with a second echo.
VOID_FORGE.title: Void Forger
VOID_FORGE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Void Form[/gold].
VOID_FORGE.flavor: When the furnace heart is hammered hollow, the echo starts eating costs.
RANDOM_FORGE_SHOP_RELIC.title: Random Stat Forger
RANDOM_FORGE_SHOP_RELIC.description: A random stat forger costs [blue]{Price}[/blue] Gold. Restocks immediately after purchase.
RANDOM_FORGE_SHOP_RELIC.flavor: The forge mouth stays open, waiting for the next coin to fall.
TRANSCENDENT_EVIL_RUNE.title: Transcendent Evil
TRANSCENDENT_EVIL_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. For every [blue]4[/blue] stacks, gain [blue]1[/blue] Focus and [blue]1[/blue] Orb Slot at the start of combat.
TRANSCENDENT_EVIL_RUNE.flavor: Once malice is cultivated, it learns to bloom on its own.
WIZARDLY_THINKING_RUNE.title: Wizardly Thinking
WIZARDLY_THINKING_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain Focus equal to the current Act number.
WIZARDLY_THINKING_RUNE.flavor: Do not swing too soon. Let the mind glow first.
ULTIMATE_UNSTOPPABLE_RUNE.title: Ultimate Unstoppable
ULTIMATE_UNSTOPPABLE_RUNE.description: After you play a card that costs [blue]2[/blue] or more, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
ULTIMATE_UNSTOPPABLE_RUNE.flavor: Before a big move takes the stage, counterplay should step aside.
FINAL_FORM_RUNE.title: Final Form
FINAL_FORM_RUNE.description: After you play a card that costs [blue]2[/blue] or more, gain [gold]Plated Armor[/gold] equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards. Triggers at most [blue]1[/blue] time each turn.
FINAL_FORM_RUNE.flavor: The final form is never meant to be shown at the start.
HAIL_TO_THE_KING_RUNE.title: All Hail The King
HAIL_TO_THE_KING_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]2[/blue] random stat forgers. After defeating an Elite, gain [blue]1[/blue] random Gold stat forger. After defeating a Boss, gain [blue]1[/blue] random Prismatic stat forger.
HAIL_TO_THE_KING_RUNE.flavor: A crown does not fall on its own unless someone has fallen on the steps first.
DICE_MANIAC_RUNE.title: Dice Maniac
DICE_MANIAC_RUNE.description: After winning combat, there is a [blue]50%[/blue] chance to drop a random stat forger. Gold and Prismatic tiers are twice as likely for all random stat forgers.
DICE_MANIAC_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Before the dice stop rolling, the prize is already waiting by the forge.
ARCANE_PUNCH_RUNE.title: Arcane Punch
ARCANE_PUNCH_RUNE.description: For every [blue]2[/blue] Attack cards you play, gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
ARCANE_PUNCH_RUNE.flavor: A spell shortened to its limit leaves only the wind of a fist.
PANDORAS_BOX_RUNE.title: Pandora's Box
PANDORAS_BOX_RUNE.description: When obtained, transform all of your Hextech runes into random Prismatic Hextech runes.
PANDORAS_BOX_RUNE.flavor: Once the box is open, every old label expires.
TAP_DANCE_RUNE.title: Tap Dance
TAP_DANCE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play an Attack card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
TAP_DANCE_RUNE.flavor: When the feet find the beat, the hand starts clapping along.
ULTIMATE_REFRESH_RUNE.title: Ultimate Refresh
ULTIMATE_REFRESH_RUNE.description: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]2[/blue] or more, play it an additional time.
ULTIMATE_REFRESH_RUNE.flavor: Starting over is too slow. Another one is just right.
BADGE_BROTHERS_RUNE.title: Badge Brothers
BADGE_BROTHERS_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Free Attack[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Free Skill[/gold].
BADGE_BROTHERS_RUNE.flavor: One hands you gloves. One hands you the toolbox.
CUTTING_EDGE_ALCHEMIST_RUNE.title: Cutting-Edge Alchemist
CUTTING_EDGE_ALCHEMIST_RUNE.description: After combat, add [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Rare[/gold] Potion and [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Uncommon[/gold] Potion to your rewards.
CUTTING_EDGE_ALCHEMIST_RUNE.flavor: The more dangerous the color, the more prestigious the label.
DEVILS_DANCE_RUNE.title: Devil's Dance
DEVILS_DANCE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play an Attack card, heal [blue]1[/blue] HP.
DEVILS_DANCE_RUNE.flavor: The steps skim the blade, and the blood only runs warmer.
EARTH_AWAKENS_RUNE.title: Earth Awakens
EARTH_AWAKENS_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Rolling Boulder[/gold].
EARTH_AWAKENS_RUNE.flavor: The silent bedrock turns over in its sleep.
SYMPHONY_OF_WAR_RUNE.title: Symphony of War
SYMPHONY_OF_WAR_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Serpent Form[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Demon Form[/gold].
SYMPHONY_OF_WAR_RUNE.flavor: When the drums begin, serpents and demons answer together.
BEGINNING_AND_END_RUNE.title: Beginning and End
BEGINNING_AND_END_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]100[/blue] [gold]Lethality[/gold] and [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Countdown[/gold].
BEGINNING_AND_END_RUNE.flavor: The opener writes the ending, and the ending collects.
UNMOVABLE_MOUNTAIN_RUNE.title: Unmovable Mountain
UNMOVABLE_MOUNTAIN_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Barricade[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Afterimage[/gold].
UNMOVABLE_MOUNTAIN_RUNE.flavor: The mountain does not chase victory. Victory runs into it.
KEYSTONE_HUNTER_RUNE.title: Keystone Hunter
KEYSTONE_HUNTER_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Tools of the Trade[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Master Planner[/gold].
KEYSTONE_HUNTER_RUNE.flavor: Every clean win starts with the right tool in hand.
WARMOGS_SPIRIT_RUNE.title: Warmog's Spirit
WARMOGS_SPIRIT_RUNE.description: For every [blue]8[/blue] cards you draw, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
WARMOGS_SPIRIT_RUNE.flavor: Before the wound closes, another plate has already grown.
MYSTERY_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Mayhem[/gold] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Entropy[/gold].
MYSTERY_RUNE.flavor: The question mark has no answer, only the next burst of chaos.
STARTUP_ROUTINE_RUNE.title: Startup Routine
STARTUP_ROUTINE_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]15[/blue] Block.
STARTUP_ROUTINE_RUNE.flavor: Until the process finishes, wounds can wait at the door.
COLLECTOR_RUNE.title: Collector
COLLECTOR_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]10%[/blue] more damage. Whenever an enemy dies, gain [blue]10[/blue] count. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
COLLECTOR_RUNE.flavor: Some count victories. Some count receipts.
LIFE_FLOW_RUNE.title: Life Flow
LIFE_FLOW_RUNE.description: Whenever [blue]1[/blue] card is exhausted, heal [blue]5%[/blue] of your Max HP. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
LIFE_FLOW_RUNE.flavor: Burned paper returns through the veins.
TRICK_LICENSE_RUNE.title: Trick License
TRICK_LICENSE_RUNE.description: You may play [gold]Sly[/gold] cards for free.
TRICK_LICENSE_RUNE.flavor: Rules make room for practiced hands.
GALACTIC_GIFT_RUNE.title: Galactic Gift
GALACTIC_GIFT_RUNE.description: Whenever you spend [blue]3[/blue] Stars, gain [blue]1[/blue] Star.
GALACTIC_GIFT_RUNE.flavor: Starlight is not currency. It merely gives change sometimes.
SOMETHING_FROM_NOTHING_RUNE.title: Something From Nothing
SOMETHING_FROM_NOTHING_RUNE.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
SOMETHING_FROM_NOTHING_RUNE.flavor: The empty space is not empty. It has not been called yet.
LUBRICANT_RUNE.title: Lubricant
LUBRICANT_RUNE.description: The first Power card you play each turn is free.
LUBRICANT_RUNE.flavor: Even the heaviest gear learns to turn smoothly on the first rotation.
HUBRIS_RUNE.title: Hubris
HUBRIS_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Every [blue]3[/blue] stacks makes you gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength and draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card at the start of combat.
HUBRIS_RUNE.flavor: The more victory weighs, the more humility feels like baggage.
GOLDEN_SPATULA_RUNE.title: Golden Spatula
GOLDEN_SPATULA_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack gives you [blue]1%[/blue] more Max HP, damage, Block, and healing. When you have more than [blue]10[/blue] stacks, this bonus is tripled.
GOLDEN_SPATULA_RUNE.flavor: It must do something... no, it can do everything!
slapRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy applies a debuff to a player, it gains [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
corrosionRune.enemyDescription: When the enemy deals unblocked damage to you for the first time each turn, you lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] or [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
brutalityRune.enemyDescription: At the start of its turn, the enemy loses [blue]5%[/blue] of its max HP and gains [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
judicatorRune.enemyDescription: The enemy deals [blue]10%[/blue]/[blue]20%[/blue]/[blue]30%[/blue] more damage to you while you are below [blue]50%[/blue] HP.
soulEaterRune.enemyDescription: When another enemy dies, this enemy heals [blue]10%[/blue] of its max HP.
deathHarvestRune.enemyDescription: Unblocked damage the enemy deals to you heals it for [blue]50%[/blue]/[blue]75%[/blue]/[blue]100%[/blue] of that amount.
giantSlayerRune.enemyDescription: The enemy shrinks. For every [blue]5[/blue] max HP the player has, the enemy deals [blue]1%[/blue] more damage to that player, up to [blue]100%[/blue].
dualWieldRune.enemyDescription: The enemy's damage is [gold]halved[/gold], and its number of hits is [gold]doubled[/gold].
frostWraithRune.enemyDescription: Every [blue]4[/blue] turns, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] turn of [gold]Borrowed Time[/gold].
escapePlanRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops the enemy below [blue]50%[/blue] of its Max HP, it gains Block equal to [blue]60%[/blue] of its Max HP and gains [blue]1[/blue] turn of [gold]Shrink[/gold]. Once per combat.
heavyHitterRune.enemyDescription: The enemy gains [blue]1%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]10[/blue] Max HP it has, up to [blue]30%[/blue].
startupRoutineRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]10[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue]/[blue]20[/blue] Block.
tormentorRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy applies a debuff to a player, they gain [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Burn[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]5[/blue] times each turn.
protectiveVeilRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [blue]{Stacks1}[/blue]/[blue]{Stacks2}[/blue]/[blue]{Stacks3}[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
repulsorRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops the enemy below [blue]50%[/blue] of its Max HP, it gains [blue]{Stacks1}[/blue]/[blue]{Stacks2}[/blue]/[blue]{Stacks3}[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold]. Once per combat.
thornmailRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
lightEmUpRune.enemyDescription: Every fourth Attack card a player plays each turn costs twice as much. The count resets at the end of the turn.
mountainSoulRune.enemyDescription: If the enemy took no unblocked damage last turn, it gains Block equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of its Max HP at the start of this turn.
firstAidKitRune.enemyDescription: The healing the enemy receives and the Block it gains increase by [blue]25%[/blue].
speedDemonRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, it gains Block equal to [blue]5[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue]% of its Max HP at the start of the next player turn. Triggers at most once each turn.
sturdyRune.enemyDescription: At the start of each turn, the enemy heals [blue]2%[/blue] of its Max HP. If it is below [blue]50%[/blue] HP, it heals [blue]4%[/blue] of its Max HP instead.
dawnbringersResolveRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops the enemy below [blue]50%[/blue] of its Max HP, it gains [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to [blue]8[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]12[/blue]% of its Max HP. Once per combat.
shrinkRayRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, the player gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
firebrandRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, it applies [blue]2[/blue] stacks of infinitely stackable [gold]Burn[/gold] to the player.
superBrainRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [gold]Plating[/gold] equal to [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]4[/blue]/[blue]5[/blue]% of its Max HP.
astralBodyRune.enemyDescription: The enemy gains [blue]20[/blue]/[blue]30[/blue]/[blue]40[/blue]% Max HP. Deals [blue]10%[/blue] less damage.
nightstalkingRune.enemyDescription: Whenever an ally dies, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Paper Cuts[/gold].
tankEngineRune.enemyDescription: At the start of each turn, the enemy gains [blue]5%[/blue] Max HP and increases its size by [blue]5%[/blue].
shrinkEngineRune.enemyDescription: At the start of the enemy turn, the enemy reduces its size by [blue]2%[/blue]. At the start of the player turn, if it has no [gold]Slippery[/gold], it gains [blue]{Stacks}[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold].
getExcitedRune.enemyDescription: Whenever an ally dies, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Painful Stabs[/gold].
twiceThriceRune.enemyDescription: Every third Attack card a player plays each turn costs twice as much. The count resets at the end of the turn.
loopRune.enemyDescription: Players draw [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] fewer cards each turn.
devilsDanceRune.enemyDescription: When the enemy deals unblocked damage, it heals [blue]6[/blue]/[blue]8[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]% of its Max HP. Triggers at most once per turn.
sonataRune.enemyDescription: At the start of odd-numbered turns, all enemies gain Block equal to [blue]8[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]12[/blue]% of their Max HP. At the start of even-numbered turns, heal all enemies for [blue]4[/blue]/[blue]5[/blue]/[blue]6[/blue]% of their Max HP.
courageOfColossusRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy applies a debuff to a player or applies a buff to itself, it gains [gold]Plating[/gold] equal to [blue]3%[/blue] of its Max HP. Triggers up to [blue]1[/blue] time each turn.
glassCannonRune.enemyDescription: The enemy deals [blue]30[/blue]/[blue]40[/blue]/[blue]50[/blue]% more damage, but it cannot heal above [blue]70%[/blue] HP.
goliathRune.enemyDescription: The enemy grows larger, gains [blue]20[/blue]/[blue]30[/blue]/[blue]40[/blue]% Max HP, and gains [blue]15[/blue]/[blue]20[/blue]/[blue]25[/blue]% more damage, Block, and healing.
handOfBaronRune.enemyDescription: The enemy gains [blue]5[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue]% more damage. At the start of each turn, all players gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
cantTouchThisRune.enemyDescription: After the enemy deals unblocked damage, it gains [blue]{Stacks}[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold].
masterOfDualityRune.enemyDescription: When the player plays a Skill, they lose [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength. When the player plays an Attack, they lose [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Dexterity.
goldrendRune.enemyDescription: The enemy gains [blue]5[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue]% more damage. Whenever it deals unblocked damage, it makes the player lose [blue]20[/blue] Gold.
feelTheBurnRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops the enemy below [blue]50%[/blue] of its Max HP, then at the start of the next turn all players gain [blue]1[/blue] turn of [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]4[/blue]/[blue]5[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold]. Once per combat.
backToBasicsRune.enemyDescription: Players cannot play more than [blue]12[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]8[/blue] cards per turn.
madScientistRune.enemyDescription: The enemy loses [blue]30[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue]/[blue]0[/blue]% Max HP. Whenever it takes damage, it adds [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] to the player's discard pile.
feyMagicRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, the player gains [blue]1[/blue] turn of [gold]Shrink[/gold] and [gold]No Draw[/gold].
finalFormRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, it gains Block equal to [blue]15[/blue]/[blue]20[/blue]/[blue]25[/blue]% of its Max HP. Triggers at most once per turn.
unmovableMountainRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Barricade[/gold]. At the start of its turn, it gains Block equal to [blue]6[/blue]/[blue]8[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]% of its Max HP.
cuttingEdgeAlchemistRune.enemyDescriptio: Potion rewards dropped after combat are at most Common.
mikaelsBlessingRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops the enemy below [blue]50%[/blue] of its Max HP, it heals [blue]10[/blue]/[blue]25[/blue]/[blue]40[/blue]% of its Max HP and removes all debuffs from itself. Twice per combat.
bloodPactRune.enemyDescription: After taking damage, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] temporary Strength. Triggers up to [blue]2[/blue] times each turn.
dizzySpinningRune.enemyDescription: Whenever a player's draw pile is shuffled, add [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] to their draw pile.
brutalForceRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength and Block equal to [blue]8%[/blue] of their Max HP.
zealotRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
bloodArmorRune.enemyDescription: During the player turn, enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold] for every [blue]12[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]8[/blue] HP they lose.
jinlianBoxRune.enemyDescription: Card rewards after combat cannot contain Rare cards.
mirrorReflectionRune.enemyDescription: When a player plays a [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold], add [blue]1[/blue] copy of it to their discard pile.
blueCandleMedkitRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, add [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Curse[/gold] to each player's discard pile.
tanksShieldRune.enemyDescription: Whenever a player plays an Attack, all enemies gain [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] Block.
doomsdayRune.enemyDescription: At the start of the enemy turn, apply [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Disintegration[/gold] to all players.
warmogsSpiritRune.enemyDescription: For every [blue]10[/blue]/[blue]8[/blue]/[blue]6[/blue] cards players draw, all enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
clownCollegeRune.enemyDescription: After taking damage, the enemy gains [blue]{Stacks}[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]1[/blue] time each turn.
singularityAiRune.enemyDescription: At the start of the player turn, add [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] random Status card to each player's draw pile.
proteinShakeRune.enemyDescription: For each [blue]5[/blue] Max HP the enemy has, it gains [blue]1%[/blue] more healing and Block, up to [blue]100%[/blue].
goldenSpatulaRune.enemyDescription: The enemy gains [blue]25[/blue]/[blue]30[/blue]/[blue]45[/blue]% Max HP and deals [blue]25[/blue]/[blue]30[/blue]/[blue]45[/blue]% more damage, but gains [blue]50%[/blue] less healing and Block.
hailToTheKingRune.enemyDescription: In Elite and Boss combats, all enemies gain [blue]{Stacks}[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold], plus [gold]Plating[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]5[/blue]/[blue]8[/blue]% of their Max HP at the start of combat.
eightPennyGateRune.enemyDescription: The first [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] non-Power cards each player plays each turn exhaust.
duffsVintageRune.enemyDescription: Players no longer automatically discard their hand at end of turn. Cards still in hand at end of turn cost [blue]1[/blue] more until played. Cards whose current cost is greater than [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] are unaffected.
hastyScribbleRune.enemyDescription: Reduce map node length by [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue]. Does not affect special maps.
upgradeRune.enemyDescription: After a player plays a card, downgrade that card for this combat.
nearDeathFeastRune.enemyDescription: When an enemy's HP falls to [blue]0[/blue] or less, it enters a dying state: it cannot gain healing or Block, and gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] per [blue]1[/blue] negative HP; it dies when its negative HP reaches [blue]5%[/blue]/[blue]10%[/blue]/[blue]15%[/blue] of its Max HP.
serpentsFangRune.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, the player gains [blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue]/[blue]4[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].
pandorasBoxRune.enemyDescription: Player card rewards can now only contain cards from other colors.
forbiddenGrimoireRune.enemyDescription: When claiming a card reward, after choosing [blue]1[/blue] card, players are forced to obtain all other unchosen cards.
porcupineRune.enemyDescription: When an enemy takes unblocked damage, it gains [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn. Triggers up to [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] times each turn.
monarchsGazeRune.enemyDescription: When a player plays an Attack, they lose [blue]1[/blue] temporary Strength.
swiftAndSafeRune.enemyDescription: For every [blue]15[/blue]/[blue]12[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue] cards players draw, all enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
tezcatarasMercyRune.enemyDescription: Relics players obtain afterward become Wax relics. Every [blue]4[/blue] combats, the leftmost Wax relic melts. Does not affect Hextech Runes or Attribute Forges.
arcanePunchRune.enemyDescription: For every [blue]2[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] Attack cards a player plays, that player gains [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Tainted[/gold].
mysteryRune.enemyDescription: At the start of the player turn, transform [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] random card in that player's hand.
mindOverMatterRune.enemyDescription: At the start of the player turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random card to that player's hand. The added card costs [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] more.
omegaRune.enemyDescription: At the start of turn 4, apply [blue]5[/blue]/[blue]8[/blue]/[blue]12[/blue] [gold]Disintegration[/gold] to all players.
manipulateRealityRune.enemyDescription: Status cards enemies add to players' combat piles are doubled.
compensationRune.enemyDescription: When an enemy would take unblocked damage, convert it into [gold]Poison[/gold] equal to [blue]1/3[/blue] of that damage, rounded down (minimum [blue]1[/blue]).
ominousPactRune.enemyDescription: Whenever an enemy deals unblocked damage, the hit player gains that much additional [gold]Doom[/gold].
solidTimeRune.enemyDescription: Whenever a player plays a Power card, they gain [blue]2[/blue]/[blue]4[/blue]/[blue]6[/blue] [gold]Galvanic[/gold].
forgottenSoulRune.enemyDescription: At the end of the turn, all Status and Curse cards in the [gold]exhaust[/gold] pile are added to the player's discard pile.
cerberusRune.enemyDescription: At the start of the player turn, all enemies gain [blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue]/[blue]4[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
omniDragonSoulRune.enemyDescription: At the start of the enemy turn, randomly apply [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold], or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all players.
natureIsHealingRune.enemyDescription: During combat, all enemies heal [blue]1[/blue] HP every [blue]15[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]5[/blue] seconds.
archmageRune.enemyDescription: Whenever a player plays a Skill, there is a [blue]33%[/blue] chance to increase the cost of [blue]1[/blue] random card in their hand by [blue]1[/blue] this turn.
bloodIdolRune.enemyDescription: Whenever a player gains Gold, they lose [blue]1[/blue] HP.
UNYIELDING_ARMOR_RUNE.title: Unyielding Armor
UNYIELDING_ARMOR_RUNE.description: [gold]Plating[/gold] no longer decreases at the start of your turn.
UNYIELDING_ARMOR_RUNE.flavor: The armor has no retreat, only more seams to harden.
NIGHT_PARADE_RUNE.title: Night Parade
NIGHT_PARADE_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Souls[/gold] to your deck.
NIGHT_PARADE_RUNE.flavor: The longer the night road, the more shadows follow.
DRAIN_RUNE.title: Drain
DRAIN_RUNE.description: Whenever you Summon, apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to all enemies equal to [blue]2[/blue] times the Summon amount.
DRAIN_RUNE.flavor: Every call draws a little from the enemy fate.
LETHAL_TEMPO_RUNE.title: Lethal Tempo
LETHAL_TEMPO_RUNE.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Shiv[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary Strength.
LETHAL_TEMPO_RUNE.flavor: The beat lands before the blade does.
EMERGENCE_RUNE.title: Emergence
EMERGENCE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, Channel [blue]2[/blue] random Orbs.
EMERGENCE_RUNE.flavor: When the circuit has no answer, current supplies one.
PRECISION_COGNITION_RUNE.title: Precision Cognition
PRECISION_COGNITION_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] Focus.
PRECISION_COGNITION_RUNE.flavor: With error removed, only the calculable world remains.
HASTY_SCRIBBLE_RUNE.title: Hasty Scribble
HASTY_SCRIBBLE_RUNE.flavor: The idea arrives too fast for neat handwriting.
CLOWN_COLLEGE_RUNE.title: Clown College
CLOWN_COLLEGE_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Trick Magic[/gold] cards to your deck.
CLOWN_COLLEGE_RUNE.flavor: The timetable is full of laughter, and every assignment is a trap.
BLADE_WALTZ_RUNE.title: Blade Waltz
BLADE_WALTZ_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Blade Waltz[/gold] to your deck.
BLADE_WALTZ_RUNE.flavor: When the dance reaches its end, the blades take a bow.
OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.title: Ocean Dragon Soul
OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Ocean Dragon Soul[/gold] to your deck.
OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.flavor: After the tide withdraws, a heartbeat remains on deck.
INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.title: Infernal Dragon Soul
INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Infernal Dragon Soul[/gold] to your deck.
INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.flavor: When the first spark lands, the ending is already hot.
HEXTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.title: Hextech Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Hextech Dragon Soul[/gold] to your deck.
HEXTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.flavor: The arc has already planned the next turn.
OMNI_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.title: Omni Dragon Soul
OMNI_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, add [blue]3[/blue] different random upgraded [gold]Dragon Soul cards[/gold] to your hand.
OMNI_DRAGON_SOUL_RUNE.flavor: Six echoes roar at once; only your choice remains.
FORGOTTEN_SOUL_RUNE.title: Forgotten Soul
FORGOTTEN_SOUL_RUNE.description: Non-Status cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] do not Exhaust when played.
FORGOTTEN_SOUL_RUNE.flavor: A memory meant to leave is pinned in place.
GOOD_LUCK_RUNE.title: Good Luck
GOOD_LUCK_RUNE.description: After combat, card rewards offer [blue]1[/blue] additional upgraded random [gold]Rare[/gold] card.
GOOD_LUCK_RUNE.flavor: The next fate rolls before the die lands.
CAREFUL_SELECTION_RUNE.title: Careful Selection
CAREFUL_SELECTION_RUNE.description: After combat, card rewards offer [blue]4[/blue] cards.
CAREFUL_SELECTION_RUNE.flavor: One more look is where the odds begin to move.
CATALYST_RUNE.title: Catalyst
CATALYST_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Catalyst[/gold] to your deck.
CATALYST_RUNE.flavor: Poison only needs a push; the rest completes itself.
UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Apotheosis
UPGRADE_RUNE.description: When obtained, upgrade all of your cards. Whenever you obtain a card, upgrade it.
UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The forge spark does not care who arrived first.
POWER_SHIELD_RUNE.title: Power Shield
POWER_SHIELD_RUNE.description: The first time you gain Block each turn, gain temporary [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the current act number.
POWER_SHIELD_RUNE.flavor: The thicker the guard, the heavier the next swing.
CORROSION_RUNE.title: Corrosion
CORROSION_RUNE.description: The first time you deal damage to an enemy each turn, it loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
CORROSION_RUNE.flavor: The armor remains; the nerve beneath rusts first.
RADIANCE_RUNE.title: Radiance
RADIANCE_RUNE.description: The first time you deal damage to an enemy each turn, deal additional damage equal to [blue]5%[/blue] of its Max HP and heal [blue]2[/blue] HP.
RADIANCE_RUNE.flavor: When the light lands, wound and edge shine together.
BLOOD_PACT_RUNE.title: Blood Pact
BLOOD_PACT_RUNE.description: Each time you lose HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [gold]Strength[/gold] next turn.
BLOOD_PACT_RUNE.flavor: The oath starts counting only after blood is spilled.
SUMMON_FORTH_RUNE.title: Summon Forth
SUMMON_FORTH_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, Forge [blue]5[/blue]. At the start of your turn, put [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] into your hand from anywhere.
SUMMON_FORTH_RUNE.flavor: Where the royal command reaches, the blade asks no path.
BYPRODUCT_RUNE.title: Byproduct
BYPRODUCT_RUNE.description: Whenever you generate [blue]1[/blue] Status card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
BYPRODUCT_RUNE.flavor: A malfunction is not waste, only the start of another circuit.
ADAPTIVE_CAPACITOR_RUNE.title: Adaptive Capacitor
ADAPTIVE_CAPACITOR_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] Orb slot.
ADAPTIVE_CAPACITOR_RUNE.flavor: Capacity grows just enough to hold the next overload.
RENEWAL_RUNE.title: Renewal
RENEWAL_RUNE.description: Whenever you discard [blue]1[/blue] card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
RENEWAL_RUNE.flavor: The old card falls, and a new one is already warm in the sleeve.
NOW_YOU_SEE_ME_RUNE.title: Now You Don't
NOW_YOU_SEE_ME_RUNE.description: During your turn, whenever you discard a Status or Curse card, Exhaust it.
NOW_YOU_SEE_ME_RUNE.flavor: Trouble tossed aside should stay gone.
SNAKEBITE_RUNE.title: !? Snakebite?!
SNAKEBITE_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Snakebite[/gold] to your hand. It is free this combat.
SNAKEBITE_RUNE.flavor: The grass moves once, and your hand moves with it.
TAUNT_RUNE.title: Taunt
TAUNT_RUNE.flavor: The darker the omen, the louder it should be spoken.
CONDENSED_RADIANCE_RUNE.title: Condensed Radiance
CONDENSED_RADIANCE_RUNE.description: Whenever you generate [blue]1[/blue] card, gain [blue]1[/blue] Stars.
CONDENSED_RADIANCE_RUNE.flavor: Every new card catches a little starlight at the edge.
WRAITH_RUNE.title: Wraith
WRAITH_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Soul[/gold] to your hand. Gain [blue]3%[/blue] more damage for each [gold]Soul[/gold] in your exhaust pile.
WRAITH_RUNE.flavor: The more grudges gather, the colder the edge becomes.
SWORD_INTENT_RUNE.title: Sword Intent
SWORD_INTENT_RUNE.description: You can play [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] for free.
SWORD_INTENT_RUNE.flavor: The blade arrives before the hand, and intent follows.
IMMORTAL_BONE_RUNE.title: Immortal Bone
IMMORTAL_BONE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, if Osty is alive, Osty heals for [blue]50%[/blue] of its Max HP.
IMMORTAL_BONE_RUNE.flavor: The bone remembers the way back.
DOOMSDAY_RUNE.title: Doomsday
DOOMSDAY_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to all enemies equal to [blue]5%[/blue] of their Max HP, with a minimum of [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
DOOMSDAY_RUNE.flavor: The ending is not sudden. It simply arrives on schedule.
SINGULARITY_AI_RUNE.title: Singularity AI
SINGULARITY_AI_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random Power card from your character to your hand. It is free this turn.
SINGULARITY_AI_RUNE.flavor: It does not predict the future. It places it in your hand.
EIGHT_PENNY_GATE_RUNE.title: Eight-Penny Gate
EIGHT_PENNY_GATE_RUNE.description: When you play an Attack or Skill card, replay it [blue]1[/blue] time and exhaust it.
GROWING_STRONGER_RUNE.title: Growing Stronger
GROWING_STRONGER_RUNE.description: Whenever you gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength, [blue]1[/blue] random card in your hand becomes free this turn.
GROWING_STRONGER_RUNE.flavor: When strength rises, opportunity loosens with it.
PLATELET_RUNE.title: Platelet
PLATELET_RUNE.description: During your turn, whenever you lose [blue]1[/blue] HP, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block.
PLATELET_RUNE.flavor: The wound opens, and the defense starts to clot.
REKINDLE_RUNE.title: Rekindle
REKINDLE_RUNE.description: Whenever [blue]2[/blue] cards are exhausted, gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
REKINDLE_RUNE.flavor: There is still one ember hiding in the ash.
MIRAGE_RUNE.title: Mirage
MIRAGE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, gain Block equal to the total Poison on all enemies.
MIRAGE_RUNE.flavor: The thicker the poison mist, the more solid the illusion becomes.
KILLER_HUNTER_RUNE.title: Killer Hunter
KILLER_HUNTER_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [blue]1[/blue] card, all enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] temporary Strength and temporary Dexterity.
KILLER_HUNTER_RUNE.flavor: A true hunter first teaches the prey to forget how to strike back.
FLAWLESS_RUNE.title: Flawless
FLAWLESS_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [blue]1[/blue] Colorless card, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block.
FLAWLESS_RUNE.flavor: A colorless gleam leaves no flaw to name.
EXPLOSION_ART_RUNE.title: Explosion Art
EXPLOSION_ART_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Big Bang[/gold] to your hand.
EXPLOSION_ART_RUNE.flavor: The end of aesthetics is a sufficiently loud finale.
SOUL_CALLING_RUNE.title: Soul Calling
SOUL_CALLING_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Soul[/gold] to your draw pile, hand, and discard pile.
SOUL_CALLING_RUNE.flavor: One quiet call, and the distant echoes line up to return.
MAKE_IT_MINE_RUNE.title: Make It Mine
MAKE_IT_MINE_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. At the start of combat, each stack makes you Summon [blue]4[/blue].
MAKE_IT_MINE_RUNE.flavor: What enemies leave behind eventually learns your name.
MISERABLE_FATE_RUNE.title: Miserable Fate
MISERABLE_FATE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, gain Block equal to the total Doom on all enemies.
MISERABLE_FATE_RUNE.flavor: The heavier their fate, the thicker your shadow becomes.
ELECTRIC_SURGE_RUNE.title: Electric Surge
ELECTRIC_SURGE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, Channel [blue]1[/blue] Lightning Orb.
ELECTRIC_SURGE_RUNE.flavor: When current wakes, it does not knock first.
GROUNDED_RUNE.title: Grounded
GROUNDED_RUNE.description: At the end of your turn, double your Block.
GROUNDED_RUNE.flavor: Once your footing settles, the shield remembers how to rise.
SERPENTS_FANG_RUNE.title: Serpent's Fang
SERPENTS_FANG_RUNE.description: When you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, apply [blue]4[/blue] additional [gold]Poison[/gold].
SERPENTS_FANG_RUNE.flavor: Venom opens the path, and the short blade bites next.
STARLIGHT_SPLENDOR_RUNE.title: Starlight Splendor
STARLIGHT_SPLENDOR_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, gain Stars equal to [blue]2[/blue] times the current turn number.
STARLIGHT_SPLENDOR_RUNE.flavor: The longer the turn count climbs, the brighter the stars answer.
DIE_FOR_YOU_RUNE.title: Die For You
DIE_FOR_YOU_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, Summon [blue]5[/blue]. The first time Osty dies each turn, record its Max HP. At the start of your next turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Osty's Wish[/gold] to your hand.
DIE_FOR_YOU_RUNE.flavor: A final guard can still become a counterstrike.
COMPENSATION_RUNE.title: Compensation
COMPENSATION_RUNE.description: When you take unblocked damage, convert it into that much [gold]Doom[/gold].
COMPENSATION_RUNE.flavor: The pain did not vanish; it changed its name.
OMINOUS_PACT_RUNE.title: Ominous Pact
OMINOUS_PACT_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to an enemy, Summon the same amount.
OMINOUS_PACT_RUNE.flavor: Every stroke of doom adds another line to the pact.
HAPPY_ACCIDENT_RUNE.title: Happy Accident
HAPPY_ACCIDENT_RUNE.description: Whenever you generate [blue]1[/blue] Status card, Channel [blue]1[/blue] random Orb and gain [blue]1[/blue] Focus.
HAPPY_ACCIDENT_RUNE.flavor: A malfunction can still twist into the right current.
MISERY_RUNE.title: Misery
MISERY_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, the enemy with the highest HP loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and you gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
MISERY_RUNE.flavor: Pain weakens best when it does not scream.
FORBIDDEN_GRIMOIRE_RUNE.title: Forbidden Grimoire
FORBIDDEN_GRIMOIRE_RUNE.description: At the end of combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and remove it.
FORBIDDEN_GRIMOIRE_RUNE.flavor: When the pages close themselves, the deck is always missing something.
ORB_SYMBIOSIS_RUNE.title: Orb Symbiosis
ORB_SYMBIOSIS_RUNE.description: Whenever you Channel [blue]1[/blue] Orb, Channel [blue]1[/blue] copy of that Orb.
ORB_SYMBIOSIS_RUNE.flavor: Once one circuit lights up, another learns how to breathe.
OLD_IDOL_RUNE.title: Old Idol
OLD_IDOL_RUNE.description: On the first turn of combat, you do not draw cards naturally. At the start of your second turn, gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
OLD_IDOL_RUNE.flavor: Offer the first turn to silence, and the old days may look back.
MONARCHS_GAZE_RUNE.title: Monarch's Gaze
MONARCHS_GAZE_RUNE.description: Whenever you attack an enemy, that enemy loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Temporary Strength[/gold].
MONARCHS_GAZE_RUNE.flavor: A monarch need not shout; the gaze is heavy enough.
HARD_BONES_RUNE.title: Hard Bones
HARD_BONES_RUNE.flavor: Bones remember pain, and how to hit back.
SEND_THEM_IN_RUNE.title: Send Them In!
SEND_THEM_IN_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Minion Strike[/gold], [gold]Minion Dive Bomb[/gold], or [gold]Minion Sacrifice[/gold] to your hand.
SEND_THEM_IN_RUNE.flavor: When the command lands, someone is always first into the light.
SWORDSMANSHIP_RUNE.title: Swordsmanship
SWORDSMANSHIP_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold], gain [blue]12[/blue] Block.
SWORDSMANSHIP_RUNE.flavor: The sword path need not hurry; the guard will follow.
EASY_DOES_IT_RUNE.title: Easy Does It
EASY_DOES_IT_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, play the top card of your draw pile.
EASY_DOES_IT_RUNE.flavor: The hand chooses before the mind catches up.
SWEEPING_BLADE_RUNE.title: Sweeping Blade
SWEEPING_BLADE_RUNE.description: Attack cards with [gold]Strike[/gold] in their name deal damage to all enemies.
SWEEPING_BLADE_RUNE.flavor: When the blade moves sideways, lines stop mattering.
ADVANCE_TO_RETREAT_RUNE.title: Advance to Retreat
ADVANCE_TO_RETREAT_RUNE.description: When you attack an enemy with [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], gain [blue]3[/blue] Block.
ADVANCE_TO_RETREAT_RUNE.flavor: A step forward can still find its guard.
NEAR_DEATH_FEAST_RUNE.title: Near-Death Feast
NEAR_DEATH_FEAST_RUNE.description: When your HP falls to [blue]0[/blue] or less, enter a dying state. While dying, you cannot gain healing or Block; die when your negative HP reaches [blue]half[/blue] of your Max HP. Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] for each negative HP. If combat victory leaves you below [blue]1[/blue] HP, recover to [blue]1[/blue].
NEAR_DEATH_FEAST_RUNE.flavor: The closer the seat is to death, the hotter the feast burns.
CHAIN_IN_SLEEVE_RUNE.title: Chain in Sleeve
CHAIN_IN_SLEEVE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Shivs[/gold], add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shiv[/gold] to your hand.
CHAIN_IN_SLEEVE_RUNE.flavor: The sleeve is narrow, but the blade-light loops again.
ROYAL_COMMAND_RUNE.title: Royal Command
ROYAL_COMMAND_RUNE.description: Whenever you spend or gain Stars, Forge [blue]3[/blue].
ROYAL_COMMAND_RUNE.flavor: When a star falls, a command takes shape.
ROYAL_TRIAL_RUNE.title: Royal Trial
ROYAL_TRIAL_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold], add [blue]2[/blue] random Minion cards to your hand.
ROYAL_TRIAL_RUNE.flavor: When the blade leaves its sheath, the retainers know to step forward.
UNSEALED_THRONE_RUNE.title: Unsealed Throne
UNSEALED_THRONE_RUNE.description: Whenever you spend or gain Stars, gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
UNSEALED_THRONE_RUNE.flavor: The throne is silent no longer, and starlight begins to flow.
CORE_OVERLOAD_RUNE.title: Core Overload
CORE_OVERLOAD_RUNE.description: Whenever you Evoke an Orb, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold].
CORE_OVERLOAD_RUNE.flavor: When the core runs hot, the calculations sharpen.
BONE_GUARD_RUNE.title: Bone Guard
BONE_GUARD_RUNE.description: Whenever you Summon, gain Block equal to [blue]50%[/blue] of the Summon amount.
BONE_GUARD_RUNE.flavor: Old bones stay awake to stand in front of you.
PLASTER_RUNE.title: Plaster
PLASTER_RUNE.description: Whenever you Summon, heal Osti for the Summon amount.
PLASTER_RUNE.flavor: White filler closes the cracks, and Osti stands steady again.
BREAD_AND_BUTTER_RUNE.title: Bread and Butter
BREAD_AND_BUTTER_RUNE.description: The first Attack card you play each turn is replayed [blue]1[/blue] time.
BREAD_AND_BUTTER_RUNE.flavor: The simplest recipe can still crisp the first strike.
BREAD_AND_CHEESE_RUNE.title: Bread and Cheese
BREAD_AND_CHEESE_RUNE.description: The first Power card you play each turn is replayed [blue]1[/blue] time.
BREAD_AND_CHEESE_RUNE.flavor: The stretch is not only texture; it can be a spell's echo.
BREAD_AND_JAM_RUNE.title: Bread and Jam
BREAD_AND_JAM_RUNE.description: The first Skill card you play each turn is replayed [blue]1[/blue] time.
BREAD_AND_JAM_RUNE.flavor: When sweetness spreads, technique loops once more.
BREAD_SANDWICH_RUNE.title: Bread Sandwich
BREAD_SANDWICH_RUNE.description: Every card you play is replayed [blue]1[/blue] time.
BREAD_SANDWICH_RUNE.flavor: People loudly demanded more fillings, and you quietly said no.
MANIPULATE_REALITY_RUNE.title: Manipulate Reality
MANIPULATE_REALITY_RUNE.description: All cards temporarily added during combat are Upgraded.
MANIPULATE_REALITY_RUNE.flavor: Reality is only a draft that has not been finalized.
SHOULDER_VAKU_RUNE.title: Vaku on Your Shoulder
SHOULDER_VAKU_RUNE.description: Increase your maximum Energy by [blue]2[/blue] and draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards each turn. At the start of odd turns, heal [blue]5%[/blue] of your max HP. [red]Vaku takes over your odd turns.[/red]
SHOULDER_VAKU_RUNE.flavor: The voice on your shoulder is quiet. Its orders are not.
BLUE_CANDLE_MEDKIT_RUNE.title: Blue Candle Medkit
BLUE_CANDLE_MEDKIT_RUNE.description: You can play unplayable Status and Curse cards. Your Status and Curse cards cost [blue]0[/blue] and Exhaust after being played.
BLUE_CANDLE_MEDKIT_RUNE.flavor: The flame reveals the wound, and the seal on the curse.
BIG_HANDS_RUNE.title: Big Hands
BIG_HANDS_RUNE.flavor: In bigger hands, bones always look fewer than they are.
DIZZY_SPINNING_RUNE.title: Spinning Dizzy
DIZZY_SPINNING_RUNE.description: Draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards each turn. Whenever your draw pile is shuffled, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your draw pile.
DIZZY_SPINNING_RUNE.flavor: The faster it spins, the blurrier the cards become.
WARMUP_EXERCISE_RUNE.title: Warmup Exercise
WARMUP_EXERCISE_RUNE.description: When your turn ends, if you dealt no damage this turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Once per combat.
WARMUP_EXERCISE_RUNE.flavor: The punch you did not throw is still waiting in your muscles.
PRIMITIVE_MADNESS_RUNE.title: Primitive Madness
PRIMITIVE_MADNESS_RUNE.description: When obtained, choose any number of cards in your deck to transform into [gold]Giant Rock[/gold].
PRIMITIVE_MADNESS_RUNE.flavor: When civilization steps aside, the stones find their own path.
PACIFIST_RUNE.title: Pacifist
PACIFIST_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]50%[/blue] more healing and Block. When you would deal damage to enemies, apply that much [gold]Doom[/gold] instead.
PACIFIST_RUNE.flavor: When the blade is sheathed, the omen begins speaking.
JINLIAN_BOX_RUNE.title: Jinlian's Box
JINLIAN_BOX_RUNE.description: When obtained, transform all Strikes and Defends in your deck into random Rare cards.
JINLIAN_BOX_RUNE.flavor: Once the lid clicks, every cheap old name disappears.
FLESH_AND_BONE_RUNE.title: Flesh and Bone
FLESH_AND_BONE_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, lose [blue]3[/blue] HP and Summon [blue]15[/blue]. At the end of combat, heal [blue]1[/blue] HP for every [blue]10[/blue] Max HP Osty has.
FLESH_AND_BONE_RUNE.flavor: When flesh gives an inch, bone advances in ranks.
THOUGHT_OVERWRITE_RUNE.title: Thought Overwrite
THOUGHT_OVERWRITE_RUNE.description: When obtained, choose any number of cards to gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. Whenever you play an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, replay it [blue]1[/blue] additional time.
THOUGHT_OVERWRITE_RUNE.flavor: Once the thought is rewritten, the echo learns to act.
PORTABLE_SLEEPING_BAG_RUNE.title: Portable Sleeping Bag
PORTABLE_SLEEPING_BAG_RUNE.description: Obtain [gold]Regal Pillow[/gold], [gold]Tiny Mailbox[/gold], [gold]Dream Catcher[/gold], and [gold]Stone Humidifier[/gold].
PORTABLE_SLEEPING_BAG_RUNE.flavor: Sleep folds into a pocket and wakes with something extra packed inside.
MOBILE_HOME_RUNE.title: Mobile Home
MOBILE_HOME_RUNE.flavor: Not many belongings, but enough for a full journey.
MORE_THE_MERRIER_RUNE.title: The More the Merrier
MORE_THE_MERRIER_RUNE.description: For each relic you have, gain [blue]1.5%[/blue] more damage, Block, and healing.
MORE_THE_MERRIER_RUNE.flavor: The heavier the pack, the louder the stride.
CRACK_THE_EGG_RUNE.title: Crack That Egg
CRACK_THE_EGG_RUNE.description: When you lose Block at the start of your turn, deal [blue]9[/blue] damage to all enemies.
CRACK_THE_EGG_RUNE.flavor: Someone has to hear the shell finish cracking.
MIRROR_REFLECTION_RUNE.title: Mirror Reflection
MIRROR_REFLECTION_RUNE.description: Duplicate your entire deck. Strike, Defend, and Curse cards are not duplicated.
MIRROR_REFLECTION_RUNE.flavor: The mirror is impartial, but refuses the dullest shadows.
