KAKA_RUNE.title: Click-Click!
KAKA_RUNE.description: You cannot play Attack cards on your first turn. At the start of your second turn, gain [gold]Ritual[/gold] equal to the current act number.
KAKA_RUNE.flavor: The first click is patience. The second is the edge.
BRUTAL_FORCE_RUNE.title: Brutal Force
BRUTAL_FORCE_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
BRUTAL_FORCE_RUNE.flavor: Fast enough, heavy enough, unreasonable enough.
QUANTUM_COMPUTING_RUNE.title: Quantum Computing
QUANTUM_COMPUTING_RUNE.description: Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, deal damage to all enemies equal to [blue]10[/blue] plus [blue]10%[/blue] of their max HP, then heal for [blue]10%[/blue] of the damage dealt.
QUANTUM_COMPUTING_RUNE.flavor: Before the answer appears, enemy HP has already collapsed.
MIND_OVER_MATTER_RUNE.title: Mind Over Matter
MIND_OVER_MATTER_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random card to your hand. It gains [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and can be played for free this combat.
MIND_OVER_MATTER_RUNE.flavor: When thought is sharp enough, reality makes room.
BLOOD_ARMOR_RUNE.title: Blood Armor
BLOOD_ARMOR_RUNE.description: During your turn, whenever you lose [blue]1[/blue] HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
SCARED_STIFF_RUNE.title: Scared Stiff
SCARED_STIFF_RUNE.description: At the end of your turn, play all Attack cards in your hand against random enemies, then Exhaust them.
SCARED_STIFF_RUNE.flavor: Fear moves the hand first. Reason catches up later.
DUFFS_VINTAGE_RUNE.title: Duff's Vintage
DUFFS_VINTAGE_RUNE.description: You no longer discard your hand automatically at end of turn. At end of turn, cards still in your hand cost [blue]1[/blue] less until played.
DUFFS_VINTAGE_RUNE.flavor: The longer it rests, the cheaper it pours.
TANKS_SHIELD_RUNE.title: Tanks' Shield
TANKS_SHIELD_RUNE.description: Whenever you play an Attack card, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block.
TANKS_SHIELD_RUNE.flavor: A shield is not for stopping. It is for charging longer.
GHOST_FORM_RUNE.title: Ghost Form
GHOST_FORM_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold] and [blue]3[/blue] [gold]No Block[/gold].
GHOST_FORM_RUNE.flavor: When the body fades, wounds have nowhere to land.
BERSERK_RUNE.title: Berserk
BERSERK_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. Gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
BERSERK_RUNE.flavor: Set even the opening on fire.
BRUTALITY_RUNE.title: Cruelty
BRUTALITY_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]2[/blue] HP and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
DEVIANT_COGNITION_RUNE.title: Deviant Cognition
DEVIANT_COGNITION_RUNE.description: All of your Attack cards are treated as having [gold]Strike[/gold] in their name.
DEVIANT_COGNITION_RUNE.flavor: Believe hard enough, and every card looks like a Strike.
CURTAIN_CALL_RUNE.title: Curtain Call
CURTAIN_CALL_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Grand Finale[/gold] with [gold]Retain[/gold] to your deck.
CURTAIN_CALL_RUNE.flavor: The final blow waits for applause.
ALL_IN_RUNE.title: All In
ALL_IN_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]All In[/gold] to your deck.
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_RUNE.title: Corpse Explosion
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_RUNE.description: Whenever an enemy dies, all enemies gain [gold]Poison[/gold] equal to its max HP.
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_RUNE.flavor: Poison only starts the first sound.
DOUBLE_EXISTENCE_RUNE.title: Double Existence
DOUBLE_EXISTENCE_RUNE.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Echo Form[/gold].
DOUBLE_EXISTENCE_RUNE.flavor: Another you is advancing the turn as well.
INSTANT_DEATH_RUNE.title: Instant Death
INSTANT_DEATH_RUNE.description: When an enemy has more [gold]Doom[/gold] than its current HP, it dies immediately.
INSTANT_DEATH_RUNE.flavor: When omen exceeds life, the ending stops waiting.
SWORD_FLIGHT_RUNE.title: Sword Flight
SWORD_FLIGHT_RUNE.description: The first time you play [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] each turn, draw until your hand is full.
SWORD_FLIGHT_RUNE.flavor: The sword moves first. The cards follow.
TRI_PRISM_RUNE.title: Tri-Prism
TRI_PRISM_RUNE.description: The first Colorless card you play each turn is free and replayed [blue]1[/blue] time.
BARBARIAN_WAY_RUNE.title: Barbarian Way
BARBARIAN_WAY_RUNE.description: When obtained, choose any number of Attacks in your deck and transform them into [gold]Claws[/gold].
GLOOMY_CLOUDS_RUNE.title: Gloomy Clouds
GLOOMY_CLOUDS_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive of all [gold]Dark[/gold] Orbs.
ELECTRODYNAMICS_RUNE.title: Electrodynamics
ELECTRODYNAMICS_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Lightning[/gold] Orbs deal damage to all enemies. At the start of your turn, Channel [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].
ELECTRODYNAMICS_RUNE.flavor: Lightning never chooses just one exit.
MENTAL_SHIELD_RUNE.title: Mental Shield
MENTAL_SHIELD_RUNE.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] Block for each card in your hand.
ENLIGHTENMENT_RUNE.title: Enlightenment
ENLIGHTENMENT_RUNE.description: All cards with Energy cost greater than [blue]1[/blue] have their Energy cost reduced to [blue]1[/blue].
ENLIGHTENMENT_RUNE.flavor: The complex price suddenly becomes simple.
WHITE_HOLE_RUNE.title: White Hole
WHITE_HOLE_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]White Hole[/gold] to your deck.
WHITE_HOLE_RUNE.flavor: Energy pours from the direction it should not.
ATTACK_DEFENSE_UNITY_RUNE.title: Attack-Defense Unity
ATTACK_DEFENSE_UNITY_RUNE.description: When obtained, pair the basic [gold]Strikes[/gold] and basic [gold]Defends[/gold] in your deck. For each pair, remove [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strike[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Defend[/gold], then add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Iron Wave[/gold].
ATTACK_DEFENSE_UNITY_RUNE.flavor: Advance and guard become the same cut.
BLACK_CANDLE_RUNE.title: Black Candle
BLACK_CANDLE_RUNE.description: When obtained, remove all Curses from your deck. Curses cannot be added to your deck.
SEARING_ATTACK_RUNE.title: Searing Attack
SEARING_ATTACK_RUNE.description: When obtained, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Searing Attack[/gold] to your deck.
SEARING_ATTACK_RUNE.flavor: The first burn mark is only the start.
OVERLORD_BLOOD_ARMOR_RUNE.title: Overlord Blood Armor
OVERLORD_BLOOD_ARMOR_RUNE.description: At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] for every [blue]40[/blue] max HP you have.
OVERLORD_BLOOD_ARMOR_RUNE.flavor: The thicker the blood, the heavier the edge.
BROKEN_GOLDEN_CROWN_RUNE.title: Broken Golden Crown
BROKEN_GOLDEN_CROWN_RUNE.description: Card rewards offer [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards. At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] additional Energy.
BROKEN_GOLDEN_CROWN_RUNE.flavor: Even cracked, the crown still burns bright.
BLOOD_IDOL_RUNE.title: Blood Idol
BLOOD_IDOL_RUNE.description: Whenever you gain Gold, heal [blue]5[/blue] HP.
BLOOD_IDOL_RUNE.flavor: The idol pulses when coins fall.
NONUPEIPE_GENEROSITY_RUNE.title: Nonupeipe's Generosity
NONUPEIPE_GENEROSITY_RUNE.description: When obtained, gain [blue]1[/blue] random Nonupeipe Ancient Relic.
PIGGY_BANK_RUNE.title: Piggy Bank
PIGGY_BANK_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]200[/blue] Gold. When you take unblocked damage, increase the counter by [blue]20[/blue]. After combat victory, gain bonus Gold equal to the counter.
PIGGY_BANK_RUNE.flavor: The harder it rings, the more it pays.
OROBAS_BLESSING_RUNE.title: Orobas's Blessing
OROBAS_BLESSING_RUNE.flavor: A blessing grows from old teeth and fresh wounds.
CROSS_ORB_RUNE.title: Cross Orb
CROSS_ORB_RUNE.description: Common cards, Potions, and Relics appear half as often.
CROSS_ORB_RUNE.flavor: Holy light filters out the ordinary.
ILLUSORY_WEAPON_RUNE.title: Illusory Weapon
ILLUSORY_WEAPON_RUNE.description: Whenever you play a Skill, deal [blue]2[/blue] damage to a random enemy. Your Skills are also treated as Attacks and trigger Attack effects.
NEOWS_GRUDGE_RUNE.title: Neow's Grudge
NEOWS_GRUDGE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Neow's Fury[/gold] with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to your hand.
NINE_DRAGON_POWER_RUNE.title: Nine Dragon Power
NINE_DRAGON_POWER_RUNE.description: After using a Potion, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack gives [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Regen[/gold] at combat start and [blue]3%[/blue] max HP, size, and healing.
TEZCATARAS_MERCY_RUNE.title: Tezcatara's Mercy
TEZCATARAS_MERCY_RUNE.description: After combat victory, drop [blue]1[/blue] extra Wax Relic. Every [blue]3[/blue] combats, your leftmost Wax Relic melts.
TEZCATARAS_MERCY_RUNE.flavor: Mercy is soft enough to drip.
FLYING_KICK_RUNE.title: Flying Kick
FLYING_KICK_RUNE.description: After you deal damage, execute monsters below [blue]{ExecutePercent}[/blue]% ([blue]10[/blue] + [blue]8%[/blue] of your max HP) of their max HP and heal [blue]10%[/blue] of your max HP.
SELL_OFF_RUNE.title: Sell Off
SELL_OFF_RUNE.description: When you discard a non-[gold]Sly[/gold] card, play it and Exhaust it.
SELL_OFF_RUNE.flavor: Extract the last value before letting go.
ZAP_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Zap
ZAP_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After playing [gold]Zap[/gold], trigger the passive of each of your [gold]Lightning Orbs[/gold].
ZAP_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The current runs one more lap through old wiring.
BLOODLETTING_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Bloodletting
BLOODLETTING_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After playing [gold]Bloodletting[/gold], return it to your hand.
BLOODLETTING_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Before the wound closes, the blade is back in hand.
BATTLE_TRANCE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Battle Trance
BATTLE_TRANCE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After playing [gold]Battle Trance[/gold], you can still draw cards this turn.
BATTLE_TRANCE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Focus no longer closes the door. It opens it wider.
EXPOSE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Expose
EXPOSE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Expose[/gold] also removes all buffs from the target.
EXPOSE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The veil opens, and the charms break with it.
KNOW_THY_PLACE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Know Thy Place
KNOW_THY_PLACE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Know Thy Place[/gold] also makes the enemy lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
KNOW_THY_PLACE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Those who overstep bow first, then kneel.
BODYGUARD_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Bodyguard
BODYGUARD_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After playing [gold]Bodyguard[/gold], heal Osty to full HP.
DIRGE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Dirge
DIRGE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The song ends, but the echo stays.
SURVIVOR_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Survivor
SURVIVOR_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After playing [gold]Survivor[/gold], you may discard any number of cards. Gain Block once for each card discarded.
SURVIVOR_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Drop the burden. Keep the way out.
STARDUST_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Stardust
STARDUST_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The starlight falls, yet none is lost.
BORROWED_TIME_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Borrowed Time
BORROWED_TIME_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Playing [gold]Borrowed Time[/gold] no longer increases card costs this turn.
BORROWED_TIME_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: This time, the interest is waived.
COMPACT_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Compact
COMPACT_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Compact[/gold] transforms all Status cards into [gold]Fuel[/gold].
COMPACT_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Waste need not stay in hand to be useful.
HOTFIX_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Hotfix
HOTFIX_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: A temporary patch leaves permanent heat.
WHIRLWIND_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Whirlwind
WHIRLWIND_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: When you play [gold]Whirlwind[/gold], if [blue]X[/blue] resolves to [blue]3[/blue] or more, double [blue]X[/blue].
WHIRLWIND_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Once the wind takes shape, it turns again.
JUGGERNAUT_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Juggernaut
JUGGERNAUT_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: When the wall falls, every enemy hears it.
REANIMATE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Reanimate
REANIMATE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Reanimate[/gold] costs [blue]1[/blue] less. Whenever any creature dies, it costs [blue]1[/blue] less this combat.
REANIMATE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The louder death rings, the deeper the call.
HIDDEN_GEM_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Hidden Gem
HIDDEN_GEM_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Hidden Gem[/gold] can add [gold]Replay[/gold] to cards that already have [gold]Replay[/gold].
HIDDEN_GEM_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: A gem can keep finding new faces.
AUTOMATION_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Automation
AUTOMATION_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: When your [gold]Automation[/gold] triggers, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.
AUTOMATION_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The old machine stops sparking and starts supplying.
ETERNAL_ARMOR_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Eternal Armor
ETERNAL_ARMOR_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: After you play Eternal Armor, [gold]Plating[/gold] no longer decreases at the start of your turn.
ETERNAL_ARMOR_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Some vows are hammered, not spoken.
JACKPOT_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Jackpot
JACKPOT_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your Jackpot instead adds [blue]3[/blue] random cards to your hand. The added cards can be played for free this combat.
JACKPOT_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The house always wins—today, you are the house.
GOLD_CARD_CUSTOMER_RUNE.title: Gold Card Customer
GOLD_CARD_CUSTOMER_RUNE.flavor: The real discount always finds your door.
VOLTAIC_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Voltaic
VOLTAIC_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Voltaic[/gold] records and channels every Orb type.
VOLTAIC_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The current remembers every path it took.
VAMPIRE_CRAWLER_RUNE.title: Vampire Crawler
VAMPIRE_CRAWLER_RUNE.description: Power cards you play go to your discard pile.
VAMPIRE_CRAWLER_RUNE.flavor: A spell lands, then crawls back to the scrap.
GRAND_FINALE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Grand Finale
GRAND_FINALE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Grand Finale[/gold] can be played directly.
GRAND_FINALE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The finale no longer waits for an empty stage.
VENERATE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Venerate
VENERATE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Light is offered, then returns to your palm.
SOLID_TIME_RUNE.title: Solid Time
SOLID_TIME_RUNE.description: When you play a Power card from your deck, remove it from your deck. At the start of combat, trigger all removed cards.
solidTimeRune.storedCards.title: Solidified Power Cards
SOLID_TIME_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Time hardens, and old spells echo each fight.
REFORGED_HELMET_RUNE.title: Reforged Helmet
REFORGED_HELMET_RUNE.description: [gold]Strength[/gold] you gain during combat is doubled.
REFORGED_HELMET_RUNE.flavor: The old helm is reforged, and every roar gains an echo.
ancientWineRune.enemyDescription: Whenever a player plays [blue]1[/blue] Skill, all enemies heal [blue]1/1/2[/blue] HP.
ARCHMAGE_RUNE.title: Archmage
ARCHMAGE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play a Skill, there is a [blue]33%[/blue] chance to make [blue]1[/blue] random card in your hand free this turn.
ARCHMAGE_RUNE.flavor: A true archmage never pays the cost directly.
CORRUPTED_BRANCH_RUNE.title: Corrupted Branch
CORRUPTED_BRANCH_RUNE.description: On pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Corruption[/gold] with [gold]Innate[/gold] to your deck. Whenever you Exhaust [blue]1[/blue] card, add [blue]1[/blue] random card to your hand.
CORRUPTED_BRANCH_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Even a dead branch can bloom when the rot is persuasive.
NATURE_IS_HEALING_RUNE.title: Nature Is Healing
NATURE_IS_HEALING_RUNE.description: During combat, heal [blue]1[/blue] HP every [blue]10[/blue] seconds.
NATURE_IS_HEALING_RUNE.flavor: Let the wound breathe, and the green will close it.
PORCUPINE_RUNE.title: Porcupine
PORCUPINE_RUNE.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [gold]Thorns[/gold] for every [blue]5[/blue] Block you have.
PORCUPINE_RUNE.flavor: Do not touch. It has written courtesy in spikes.
COLOR_DISCOVERY_RUNE.title: Color Discovery
COLOR_DISCOVERY_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random cards from other characters and add it to your hand. It is free this combat. After combat, that card appears as an extra card reward option.
COLOR_DISCOVERY_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Change the color, and the answer may shine.
BASH_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Bash
BASH_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: When you play [gold]Bash[/gold], gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. When you play [gold]Break[/gold], gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
BASH_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Bash opens the way; Break ends the argument.
NEUTRALIZE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Neutralize
NEUTRALIZE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: When you discard [gold]Neutralize[/gold] or [gold]Suppress[/gold], play it against all enemies [blue]2[/blue] times.
NEUTRALIZE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: A blade leaving your hand can still find every opening.
FALLING_STAR_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Falling Star
FALLING_STAR_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Falling Star[/gold] and [gold]Meteor Shower[/gold] also stun enemies for [blue]1[/blue] turn.
FALLING_STAR_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Before the star falls, the sky pauses.
UNLEASH_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Unleash
UNLEASH_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: When your [gold]Unleash[/gold] or [gold]Protector[/gold] deals unblocked damage, Osty summons the same amount.
UNLEASH_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Osty hears the order and the wound.
OMEGA_RUNE.title: Omega
OMEGA_RUNE.description: Starting on turn [blue]4[/blue], at the end of your turn, deal [blue]50[/blue] damage to all enemies.
OMEGA_RUNE.flavor: When the countdown ends, only the finale remains.
VIOLENCE_RUNE.title: Violence
VIOLENCE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random Attack from your draw pile to your hand. It is free this turn.
VIOLENCE_RUNE.flavor: Answers can be complex. Striking does not have to be.
BIG_KNIFE_RUNE.title: Big Knife
BIG_KNIFE_RUNE.description: Whenever you would gain a [gold]Shiv[/gold], gain a free [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] instead. Shiv-related effects also apply to [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold].
BIG_KNIFE_RUNE.flavor: When the knife grows, the rules make room.
MISERY_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Misery
MISERY_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: If your [gold]Misery[/gold] target is the only enemy in play, also double all of its debuffs.
MISERY_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: When misery has nowhere to spread, it deepens.
DECAY_RUNE.title: Decay
DECAY_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for each [gold]Weak[/gold] they have.
DECAY_RUNE.flavor: Weakness opens the first crack; strength leaks out after it.
SNAIL_FORM_RUNE.title: Pell's Laziness
SNAIL_FORM_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [gold]Slow[/gold]. At the start of your turn, set [gold]Slow[/gold] to [blue]{TurnStartSlow}[/blue]. Whenever you play a card, increase [gold]Slow[/gold] by [blue]{CardSlowGain}[/blue].
SNAIL_FORM_RUNE.flavor: Move slowly enough, and damage cannot catch you.
UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.title: Universal Scope
UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.description: After you play an Attack, [blue]15%[/blue] chance to return it to your hand and refund its cost.
UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.flavor: Aim well enough, and striking takes less effort.
MORE_UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.title: More Universal Scope
MORE_UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.description: After you play an Attack, [blue]30%[/blue] chance to return it to your hand and refund its cost.
MORE_UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.flavor: After the second calibration, half the miss vanishes.
MOST_UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.title: Most Universal Scope
MOST_UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.description: After you play an Attack, [blue]50%[/blue] chance to return it to your hand and refund its cost.
MOST_UNIVERSAL_SCOPE_RUNE.flavor: The sight nearly pulls the trigger for you.
DULL_BLADE_RUNE.title: Dull Blade
DULL_BLADE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, trigger loss-of-HP effects [blue]1[/blue] time, then restore the HP lost this way.
DULL_BLADE_RUNE.flavor: The edge is dull. The pain is not.
SHRIEK_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Shriek
SHRIEK_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Piercing Wail[/gold] also makes enemies lose [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] non-temporary [gold]Strength[/gold].
SHRIEK_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The sound scrapes bone and leaves strength behind.
SNAKEBITE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Snakebite
SNAKEBITE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: At the end of your turn, each [gold]Snakebite[/gold] retained this turn gains [blue]{Replays}[/blue] [gold]Replay[/gold] for this combat.
SNAKEBITE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The longer it coils in your sleeve, the faster it strikes.
INKSHADOW_RUNE.title: Inkshadow
INKSHADOW_RUNE.description: Whenever you gain a [gold]Shiv[/gold], it gains [gold]Inky[/gold]. This can affect [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] from [gold]Big Knife[/gold].
INKSHADOW_RUNE.flavor: The shadow lands before the blade leaves its sheath.
EXTREME_SPEED_RUNE.title: Extreme Speed
EXTREME_SPEED_RUNE.description: On pickup, choose any number of transformable cards in your deck to transform into [gold]Adrenaline[/gold]. Lose [blue]{MaxHpLoss}[/blue] Max HP for each card transformed.
EXTREME_SPEED_RUNE.flavor: Fast enough for the body to fall behind the will.
SKY_DRILL_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Heavenly Drill
SKY_DRILL_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: If your [gold]Heavenly Drill[/gold]'s final [gold]X[/gold] is [blue]{XThreshold}[/blue] or more, resolve [gold]X[/gold] as [blue]{XMultiplier}[/blue] times its value.
SKY_DRILL_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The higher the drill spins, the wider the sky opens.
CHARGE_UP_RUNE.title: Charge Up
CHARGE_UP_RUNE.description: When you spend Stars, gain that many [gold]Vigor[/gold].
CHARGE_UP_RUNE.flavor: Every motion pushes the next one farther.
DEADWOOD_RUNE.title: Deadwood
DEADWOOD_RUNE.description: Whenever an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card is exhausted, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random card to your hand.
DEADWOOD_RUNE.flavor: When dry branches burn away, something else grows in the ash.
SOW_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Sow
SOW_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [gold]Sow[/gold], that card permanently gains [blue]1[/blue] damage for the rest of the run.
SOW_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Every seed sown digs a little deeper.
REAP_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Reap
REAP_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [gold]Reap[/gold], that card permanently gains [blue]3[/blue] damage for the rest of the run.
REAP_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: What you reap, you reap again — harder.
IRON_WAVE_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Iron Wave
IRON_WAVE_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play [gold]Iron Wave[/gold], that card permanently gains [blue]1[/blue] damage and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] for the rest of the run.
IRON_WAVE_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Each wave leaves the iron a little harder.
BONE_BREAK_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Bone Shards
BONE_BREAK_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Bone Shards[/gold] additionally deals damage to all enemies equal to Osty's current HP, and grants that much [gold]Block[/gold].
BONE_BREAK_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Before the bone breaks, it hands you its last strength.
UNDYING_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Undeath
UNDYING_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Undeath is not staying. It is vanishing again and again.
AUTO_PATROL_RUNE.title: Auto Patrol
AUTO_PATROL_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, for every [blue]{OstyHpPerCard}[/blue] current HP Osty has, play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Sweeping Gaze[/gold].
AUTO_PATROL_RUNE.flavor: The patrol route is written in bone.
REPROGRAM_RUNE.title: Reprogram
REPROGRAM_RUNE.description: On pickup, add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Reprogram[/gold] to your deck.
REPROGRAM_RUNE.flavor: Old instructions are erased; new errors begin to glow.
DEATH_HARVEST_RUNE.title: Death Harvest
DEATH_HARVEST_RUNE.description: During the first turn of each combat, unblocked damage you deal to enemies heals you for half that amount.
DEATH_HARVEST_RUNE.flavor: When the first blood falls, the harvest has already begun.
STOKE_RUNE.title: Stoke
STOKE_RUNE.description: You can remove cards at rest sites.
STOKE_RUNE.flavor: The fire eats an old card and leaves a cleaner path.
HATTRICK_RUNE.title: Hattrick
HATTRICK_RUNE.description: When choosing a card reward, you may take any number of the offered cards.
HATTRICK_RUNE.flavor: Fast hands turn a choice into a haul.
ANTHONY_BIAS_RUNE.title: Anthony's Bias
ANTHONY_BIAS_RUNE.description: For each card in your deck, gain [blue]{PercentPerCard}%[/blue] more damage, Block, and healing.
ANTHONY_BIAS_RUNE.flavor: Prejudice stacks best when the deck is thick.
TRINITY_RUNE.title: Trinity
TRINITY_RUNE.description: Whenever you spend Energy, gain that much Stars. Whenever you spend Stars, Forge that much.
TRINITY_RUNE.flavor: Energy, starlight, and the royal blade converge.
CRASH_LANDING_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Crash Landing
CRASH_LANDING_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Crash Landing[/gold] fills your hand with [gold]Collision Course[/gold] instead.
CRASH_LANDING_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Your Highness descends from the heavens!!!
MARKOV_BABBLE_RUNE.title: Markov Babble
MARKOV_BABBLE_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, fill your empty Orb slots with random Orbs.
MARKOV_BABBLE_RUNE.flavor: Probability has no punctuation. It only keeps talking.
BODY_SLAM_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Body Slam
BODY_SLAM_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: Your [gold]Body Slam[/gold] deals double damage, but removes all your Block after it is played.
BODY_SLAM_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Put everything behind the hit, including your guard.
HUNDRED_REFINEMENTS_RUNE.title: Hundred Refinements
HUNDRED_REFINEMENTS_RUNE.description: You may use card rewards to Forge Body. Every [blue]{BodyForges}[/blue] Body Forges, gain [blue]{ForgeCount}[/blue] random attribute Forge.
HUNDRED_REFINEMENTS_RUNE.flavor: You can pass on the card. You cannot skip the training.
RECYCLE_BIN_RUNE.title: Recycle Bin
RECYCLE_BIN_RUNE.description: Status cards in your discard pile are not shuffled into your draw pile.
FURIOUS_GLARE_RUNE.title: Furious Glare
FURIOUS_GLARE_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
FURIOUS_GLARE_RUNE.flavor: Make them flinch, then step forward.
ECHO_RUNE.title: Echo
ECHO_RUNE.description: Whenever you generate a card, generate an additional identical card with [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. It can be played for free this turn.
ECHO_RUNE.flavor: Before the royal decree lands, the echo has already arrived.
DOUBLE_VISION_RUNE.title: Double Vision
DOUBLE_VISION_RUNE.description: When you take a card, gold, potion, or relic reward, gain one additional copy of that same reward.
DOUBLE_VISION_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Love from a happy family and a smiling little bald head.
CARD_INSPECTION_RUNE.title: Card Inspection
CARD_INSPECTION_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, instead of automatically drawing cards, choose that many cards from your draw pile and put them into your hand.
CARD_INSPECTION_RUNE.flavor: The top card was only a suggestion. Read the deck yourself.
BLANK_CHECK_RUNE.title: Blank Check
BLANK_CHECK_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] random Colorless card. Your Colorless cards cost [blue]0[/blue], but [gold]Exhaust[/gold] after being played.
BLANK_CHECK_RUNE.flavor: The amount is blank. The price is written on the back.
blankCheckRune.enemyDescription: After you play a card, that card gains [gold]Ethereal[/gold] for the rest of combat.
SKULKING_COLONY_HEX.title: Upgrade: Skulking Colony
SKULKING_COLONY_HEX.description: At the start of combat, if the enemy has no [gold]Hardened Shell[/gold], it gains [gold]Hardened Shell[/gold] equal to [blue]60%[/blue] of its Max HP, with a minimum of [blue]12[/blue].
SKULKING_COLONY_HEX.flavor: Even coral knows to hide its soft parts inside a shell.
skulkingColonyHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, if the enemy has no [gold]Hardened Shell[/gold], it gains [gold]Hardened Shell[/gold] equal to [blue]60%[/blue] of its Max HP, with a minimum of [blue]12[/blue].
PHANTASMAL_GARDENER_HEX.title: Upgrade: Phantasmal Gardener
PHANTASMAL_GARDENER_HEX.description: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [gold]Skittish[/gold] equal to [blue]8%[/blue]/[blue]10%[/blue]/[blue]12%[/blue] of its Max HP.
PHANTASMAL_GARDENER_HEX.flavor: The gardener is gone, yet the garden grows ever more vicious.
phantasmalGardenerHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [gold]Skittish[/gold] equal to [blue]8%[/blue]/[blue]10%[/blue]/[blue]12%[/blue] of its Max HP.
QUEEN_HEX.title: Upgrade: Queen
QUEEN_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Chains of Binding[/gold]. Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, if a player has fewer than [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Chains of Binding[/gold], they gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Chains of Binding[/gold].
QUEEN_HEX.flavor: The other end of the chain always rests in the throne's hand.
queenHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Chains of Binding[/gold]. Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, if a player has fewer than [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Chains of Binding[/gold], they gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Chains of Binding[/gold].
LAGAVULIN_MATRIARCH_HEX.title: Upgrade: Lagavulin Matriarch
LAGAVULIN_MATRIARCH_HEX.description: Every [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] turns, all players lose [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity.
LAGAVULIN_MATRIARCH_HEX.flavor: When the matriarch commands, your strength is no longer yours.
lagavulinMatriarchHex.enemyDescription: Every [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] turns, all players lose [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity.
EXOSKELETON_HEX.title: Upgrade: Exoskeleton
EXOSKELETON_HEX.description: At the start of combat, if the enemy has no [gold]Hard to Kill[/gold], it gains [gold]Hard to Kill[/gold] equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of its Max HP, with a minimum of [blue]6[/blue].
EXOSKELETON_HEX.flavor: A shell beneath the shell. The bug is more patient than you.
exoskeletonHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, if the enemy has no [gold]Hard to Kill[/gold], it gains [gold]Hard to Kill[/gold] equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of its Max HP, with a minimum of [blue]6[/blue].
TEST_SUBJECT_HEX.title: Upgrade: Test Subject
TEST_SUBJECT_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] [gold]Enrage[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Painful Stabs[/gold].
TEST_SUBJECT_HEX.flavor: Lab note, line one: pain response excellent.
testSubjectHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] [gold]Enrage[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Painful Stabs[/gold].
LEAF_SLIME_HEX.title: Upgrade: Leaf Slime
LEAF_SLIME_HEX.description: Every [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] turns, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Slimed[/gold] to each player's discard pile.
LEAF_SLIME_HEX.flavor: Under the leaves, it's always stickier than it looks.
leafSlimeHex.enemyDescription: Every [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] turns, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Slimed[/gold] to each player's discard pile.
SHRINKER_BEETLE_HEX.title: Upgrade: Shrinker Beetle
SHRINKER_BEETLE_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
SHRINKER_BEETLE_HEX.flavor: It doesn't care how strong you are—only how big.
shrinkerBeetleHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
INKLET_HEX.title: Upgrade: Inklet
INKLET_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue]/[blue]3[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold].
INKLET_HEX.flavor: One drop of ink is enough to make the whole page slip.
inkletHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]{Stacks1}[/blue]/[blue]{Stacks2}[/blue]/[blue]{Stacks3}[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold].
PHROG_PARASITE_HEX.title: Upgrade: Phrog Parasite
PHROG_PARASITE_HEX.description: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Infection[/gold] to the player's discard pile.
PHROG_PARASITE_HEX.flavor: The phrog is only the host. The itch is yours.
phrogParasiteHex.enemyDescription: Whenever the enemy deals unblocked damage, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Infection[/gold] to the player's discard pile.
VANTOM_HEX.title: Upgrade: Vantom
VANTOM_HEX.description: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold] for every [blue]25[/blue] Max HP it has.
VANTOM_HEX.flavor: The bigger the shadow, the harder to grasp.
vantomHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold] for every [blue]25[/blue] Max HP it has.
AEONGLASS_HEX.title: Upgrade: Aeonglass
AEONGLASS_HEX.description: At the start of the player turn, add [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] [gold]Wither[/gold] to that player's hand. Whenever a player's draw pile is shuffled, upgrade all of their [gold]Wither[/gold] cards.
AEONGLASS_HEX.flavor: The sand never stops; the withering only deepens.
aeonglassHex.enemyDescription: At the start of the player turn, add [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue] [gold]Wither[/gold] to that player's hand. Whenever a player's draw pile is shuffled, upgrade all of their [gold]Wither[/gold] cards.
THE_LOST_HEX.title: Upgrade: The Lost
THE_LOST_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all players lose [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
THE_LOST_HEX.flavor: What it picks up loses its name forever.
theLostHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all players lose [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
THE_FORGOTTEN_HEX.title: Upgrade: The Forgotten
THE_FORGOTTEN_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all players lose [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
THE_FORGOTTEN_HEX.flavor: Forgetting isn't blank—something remembers for you.
theForgottenHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all players lose [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
SLIMED_BERSERKER_HEX.title: Upgrade: Slimed Berserker
SLIMED_BERSERKER_HEX.description: At the start of combat, add [blue]5[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue] [gold]Slimed[/gold] to the players' discard piles.
SLIMED_BERSERKER_HEX.flavor: On its charge, slime outnumbers footprints.
slimedBerserkerHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, add [blue]5[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue] [gold]Slimed[/gold] to the players' discard piles.
GLOBE_HEAD_HEX.title: Upgrade: Globe Head
GLOBE_HEAD_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]6[/blue]/[blue]9[/blue] [gold]Galvanic[/gold].
GLOBE_HEAD_HEX.flavor: Nothing in its head but current, still thinking.
globeHeadHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]3[/blue]/[blue]6[/blue]/[blue]9[/blue] [gold]Galvanic[/gold].
MYTE_HEX.title: Upgrade: Myte
MYTE_HEX.description: At the start of each turn, add [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Toxic[/gold] to the players' hands.
MYTE_HEX.flavor: The itch always arrives before the pain.
myteHex.enemyDescription: At the start of each turn, add [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Toxic[/gold] to the players' hands.
BYRDONIS_HEX.title: Upgrade: Byrdonis
BYRDONIS_HEX.description: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Territorial[/gold].
BYRDONIS_HEX.flavor: The border drawn by wings is harder than claws.
byrdonisHex.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all enemies gain [blue]0[/blue]/[blue]1[/blue]/[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Territorial[/gold].
VOID_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Void Form
VOID_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, automatically play all of your [gold]Void Form[/gold] cards. Void Forms played this way do not end your turn.
VOID_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: Even in the void, one hand keeps playing.
ECHO_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Echo Form
ECHO_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, automatically play all of your [gold]Echo Form[/gold] cards.
ECHO_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The echo doesn't wait for you to speak first.
SERPENT_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Serpent Form
SERPENT_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, automatically play all of your [gold]Serpent Form[/gold] cards.
SERPENT_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The serpents need no order — dusk alone unleashes them.
DEMON_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Demon Form
DEMON_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, automatically play all of your [gold]Demon Form[/gold] cards.
DEMON_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: When the pact comes due, the demon shows up on its own.
REAPER_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.title: Upgrade: Reaper Form
REAPER_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, automatically play all of your [gold]Reaper Form[/gold] cards.
REAPER_FORM_UPGRADE_RUNE.flavor: The Reaper is never late; the turn's end is its appointed hour.
